                                                                                                                                                                                                                      theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.inference_critical_pair_of_chain {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {s r ds j0 : V} {Tr Fa : V → Prop} (hj0 : j0 < LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds) (hAj0 : chainAsucc ds j0 = seqSucc s ∨ chainAsucc ds j0 = LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Bootstrapping.qqFalsum) (hchain : ∀ i ≤ j0, ∀ (B : V), inAnt B (chainAnt ds i) → inAnt B (seqAnt s) ∨ ∃ i' < i, B = chainAsucc ds i') (hrank : ∀ i < j0, irk (chainAsucc ds i) ≤ r) (hwfR : ∀ i ≤ j0, ∀ (A : V), tp (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds i) = isymR A → 0 < irk A ∨ Tr A) (hwfL : ∀ i ≤ j0, ∀ (k A : V), tp (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds i) = isymLk k A → 0 < irk A ∨ Fa A) (hperm : ∀ i ≤ j0, iperm (tp (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds i)) (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds i))) (hnperm : ∀ i ≤ j0, ¬iperm (tp (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds i)) s) (hdisj : ∀ (A : V), ¬(Tr A ∧ Fa A)) (hFa_rk : ∀ (A : V), Fa A → irk A = 0) (hFa_bot : Fa LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Bootstrapping.qqFalsum) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                      ∃ (i : V) (j : V) (k : V), i < j ∧ j ≤ j0 ∧ tp (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds i) = isymR (chainAsucc ds i) ∧ tp (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds j) = isymLk k (chainAsucc ds i) ∧ 0 < irk (chainAsucc ds i) ∧ irk (chainAsucc ds i) ≤ r

                                                                                                                                                                                                                      L3.1 on a GENUINE chain (E-CRUX2 §8.1, the lap-66 NEXT-item-1 bridge). For the chain zK s r ds with chain-inference data j0 (from isChainInf: hj0/hAj0/hchain/hrank are exactly its three components), the coded symbol sequence Iseq := tpSeq ds (so znth Iseq i = tp (znth ds i)), and the premise/conclusion permissibility (hperm = Lemma 3.3 on each premise tp(dᵢ) ◁ Πᵢ; hnperm = criticality tp(dᵢ) ⋪ Π) plus the truth/rank well-formedness, Lemma 3.1 produces the redex (i,j,k) on the GENUINE tp-symbols: tp(dᵢ)=R_{Aᵢ}, tp(d_j)=L^k_{Aᵢ}, 0<rk(Aᵢ)≤r. This is the exact input T3.4(a) (irk_cut_lt_rank) consumes. The chain-structural facts hchain/hAj0/hrank are discharged directly from isChainInf; hperm/hnperm/hwfR/hwfL remain the deferred well-formedness obligations (supplied later by the refined ZPhi end-sequent matching + §5 atomic truth). Tr/Fa are abstract truth predicates (only hdisj/hFa_rk/hFa_bot consumed).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                      theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.inference_critical_pair_of_chain_tp {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {s r ds j0 : V} (hj0 : j0 < LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds) (hAj0 : chainAsucc ds j0 = seqSucc s ∨ chainAsucc ds j0 = LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Bootstrapping.qqFalsum) (hchain : ∀ i ≤ j0, ∀ (B : V), inAnt B (chainAnt ds i) → inAnt B (seqAnt s) ∨ ∃ i' < i, B = chainAsucc ds i') (hrank : ∀ i < j0, irk (chainAsucc ds i) ≤ r) (hform1 : ∀ i ≤ j0, zTag (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds i) = 1 → LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Bootstrapping.IsUFormula ℒₒᵣ (zIallF (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds i))) (hform2 : ∀ i ≤ j0, zTag (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds i) = 2 → LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Bootstrapping.IsUFormula ℒₒᵣ (zInegF (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds i))) (hform5 : ∀ i ≤ j0, zTag (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds i) = 5 → LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Bootstrapping.IsUFormula ℒₒᵣ (zAxAllF (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds i))) (hform6 : ∀ i ≤ j0, zTag (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds i) = 6 → LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Bootstrapping.IsUFormula ℒₒᵣ (zAxNegF (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds i))) (hperm : ∀ i ≤ j0, iperm (tp (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds i)) (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds i))) (hnperm : ∀ i ≤ j0, ¬iperm (tp (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds i)) s) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                      ∃ (i : V) (j : V) (k : V), i < j ∧ j ≤ j0 ∧ tp (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds i) = isymR (chainAsucc ds i) ∧ tp (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds j) = isymLk k (chainAsucc ds i) ∧ 0 < irk (chainAsucc ds i) ∧ irk (chainAsucc ds i) ≤ r

                                                                                                                                                                                                                      L3.1 on a genuine chain, with the truth bookkeeping discharged for the CURRENT tp. Specialises inference_critical_pair_of_chain at Tr := ⊥, Fa := (· = ⊥): then tp_ne_isymLk discharges hwfL tp_isymR_pos reduces hwfR to formula-hood of the I-rule principal formulas (hform1/hform2), tp_isymLk_pos reduces hwfL to formula-hood of the §5 atomic principal formulas (hform5/hform6) — so hwfL is now discharged by the genuine rank bound, not vacuously — and hdisj/hFa_rk/hFa_bot are immediate. The deferred obligation is now exactly hperm+hnperm (Lemma 3.3 tp(dᵢ)◁Πᵢ + criticality tp(dᵢ)⋪Π) plus principal-formula well-formedness — pinpointing that the only genuinely-missing content is the sequent-matching (ZPhi end-sequent + §5 antecedent membership) that makes hperm/hnperm simultaneously satisfiable for a real critical chain.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                      Internal variadic max-fold over a premise sequence #

                                                                                                                                                                                                                      The K^r rule takes a sequence ds; idg/iõ fold over it inside V. InternalCor34.ibigMul is a meta-iterate (external k : ℕ) and cannot reach an internal arity lh ds; this is the genuine internal fold via PR.Construction over a counter (partial fold of the first j elements).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                      iseqMaxTab s ds = max_{i < lh ds} znth s (znth ds i) — max of the value-table entries at the sub-indices. For idg's K^r case max{idg(d0)-1,…,idg(dl)-1, r}; since ∸ commutes with max, this equals max r (iseqMaxTab s ds ∸ 1).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.le_iseqMaxAux {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {s ds : V} (j i : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  i < j → LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth s (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds i) ≤ iseqMaxAux s ds j

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Every sub-value in range is dominated by the partial fold.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.le_iseqMaxTab {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {s ds i : V} (hi : i < LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth s (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds i) ≤ iseqMaxTab s ds

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  The full fold dominates each sequence entry's table value (for i < lh ds).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  idg — the degree assignment, total 𝚺₁ by course-of-values recursion #

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Buchholz §4: dg(atom)=0; dg(I·d0)=dg(d0); dg(Ind d0 d1)=max{dg(d0)-1,dg(d1)-1,rk F}; dg(K^r d0…dl)=max{dg(d0)-1,…,dg(dl)-1,r}. Realized as a total function on ALL codes via the same table reduction as iC (InternalONote): idgTable n = ⟨idg 0,…,idg n⟩, the step idgNext d s reading sub-results out of s at the projection indices (all ≤ d). The K^r fold uses iseqMaxTab with max{…,dⱼ-1} = (max dⱼ) ∸ 1 (∸ commutes with max).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  noncomputable def GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.idgNext {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (d s : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  V

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Table step of idg: idg d from the table s = ⟨idg 0,…,idg (d-1)⟩, dispatching on zTag d.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  source

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.idgTable_seq {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (n : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Seq (idgTable n)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.idgTable_lh {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (n : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh (idgTable n) = n + 1
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.znth_idgTable_succ {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {n k : V} (hk : k < n + 1) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth (idgTable (n + 1)) k = LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth (idgTable n) k
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.znth_idgTable_eq_idg {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (N k : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  k ≤ N → LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth (idgTable N) k = idg k

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Table stability: every entry of the length-(N+1) table is the genuine idg value.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.idg_eq_idgNext {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {c : V} (hpos : 0 < c) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  idg c = idgNext c (idgTable (c - 1))

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  idg c = idgNext c (idgTable (c-1)) for positive codes (the table-reduction unfolding).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.le_pred_of_lt {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {a c : V} (h : a < c) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  a ≤ c - 1

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  a < c ⟹ a ≤ c - 1 (a sub-index lands in the length-c table).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  idg recursion equations (Buchholz §4) #

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.idg_zAtom {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (s : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  idg (zAtom s) = 0
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.idg_zIall {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (s a p d0 : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  idg (zIall s a p d0) = idg d0
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.idg_zIneg {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (s p d0 : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  idg (zIneg s p d0) = idg d0
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.idg_zInd {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (s at' p d0 d1 : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  idg (zInd s at' p d0 d1) = (idg d0 - 1) ⊔ (idg d1 - 1) ⊔ irk p
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.idg_zAxAll {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (s p k : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  idg (zAxAll s p k) = 0

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  dg(Ax^{∀xF,k}) = 0 (Buchholz Lemma 5.2: every atomic axiom has degree 0). Tag 5 falls into idgNext's else branch.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.idg_zAxNeg {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (s p : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  idg (zAxNeg s p) = 0

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  dg(Ax^{¬A,0}) = 0 (Buchholz Lemma 5.2). Tag 6 falls into idgNext's else branch.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.idg_zAx1 {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (s C : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  idg (zAx1 s C) = 0

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  dg(Ax^1_{·→C}) = 0 (Buchholz Lemma 5.2: every atomic axiom has degree 0). Tag 7 falls into idgNext's else branch.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  idg-fold over a premise sequence (for the variadic K^r equation) #

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  iseqMaxIdg ds = max_{i < lh ds} idg(znth ds i) — the genuine idg-fold (applies idg directly, independent of any value-table). The K^r step in idgNext reads the table form iseqMaxTab (idgTable M) ds; when M dominates every entry (which holds for M = zK… - 1), the two agree by table stability. This yields the clean idg_zK equation.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          noncomputable def GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iseqMaxIdg {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (ds : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          V

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          idg-fold over a sequence: iseqMaxIdg ds = max_{i < lh ds} idg(znth ds i).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          Equations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          • GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iseqMaxIdg ds = GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iseqMaxIdgAux ds (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          Instances For
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iseqMaxAux_idgTable_eq {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {M ds : V} (hdom : ∀ i < LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds, LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds i ≤ M) (j : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            j ≤ LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds → iseqMaxAux (idgTable M) ds j = iseqMaxIdgAux ds j

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Table-fold = idg-fold under dominance. If M is ≥ every in-range entry of ds, the value-table fold over idgTable M agrees with the direct idg-fold.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.idg_zK {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (s r ds : V) (hds : LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Seq ds) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            idg (zK s r ds) = r ⊔ (iseqMaxIdg ds - 1)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            The variadic K^r degree equation (Buchholz §4): for a sequence of premises ds, dg(K^r_Π d0…dl) = max{dg(d0)-1,…,dg(dl)-1, r} = max r ((max_j dg(dⱼ)) ∸ 1).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            iotil (õ) — the pre-ordinal assignment, total 𝚺₁ #

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Buchholz §4: õ(atom)=…(§5); õ(I·d0)=õ(d0)+1; õ(Ind d0 d1)=ω^{õ d0} # ω^{õ d1 + 1}; õ(K^r d0…dl)=ω^{õ d0} # … # ω^{õ dl}. Here ω^α = ocOadd α 1 0, +1 = iadd · (ocOadd 0 1 0), # = inadd. Same table reduction as idg. The K^r #-fold uses the table-helper iseqNaddTab.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            #-fold over a premise sequence (table form, for the K^r step) #

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            source

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        noncomputable def GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.oAtomLk {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (C : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        V

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        The pre-ordinal õ of an Ax^{C,t} atomic axiom (Buchholz Lemma 5.2, §5): 2·rk(C) − 1, encoded as the finite InternalONote ocOadd 0 (rk C + rk C ∸ 1) 0. For the L-symbol axioms Ax^{∀xF,k} (C = ∀xF) and Ax^{¬A,0} (C = ¬A) where rk(C) > 0, the coefficient 2·rk(C)−1 ≥ 1, so this is a genuine NF (isNF_oAtomLk_pos).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Equations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        • GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.oAtomLk C = GoodsteinPA.InternalONote.ocOadd 0 (GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.irk C + GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.irk C - 1) 0

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            noncomputable def GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.oAtom1 {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (C : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            V

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            The pre-ordinal õ of an Ax1_{Γ→C} atomic axiom (Buchholz Lemma 5.2): 2·rk(C), as a finite InternalONote (0 when rk C = 0, else ocOadd 0 (2·rk C) 0). This is the õ of the reduct d[0] = Ax1_{Π0} of an L-symbol axiom; icmp_oAtom1_oAtomLk is the Lemma-5.2 atomic descent.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Equations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            • GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.oAtom1 C = if GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.irk C = 0 then 0 else GoodsteinPA.InternalONote.ocOadd 0 (GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.irk C + GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.irk C) 0
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Instances For
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.isNF_oAtom1 {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (C : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              InternalONote.isNF (oAtom1 C)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              õ(Ax1_{Γ→C}) is always a genuine NF (it's 0, or ocOadd 0 (2·rk C) 0 with 2·rk C > 0).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Structural correctness of the iotil table (mirror idg) #

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.ioTable_seq {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (n : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Seq (ioTable n)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.ioTable_lh {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (n : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh (ioTable n) = n + 1
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.znth_ioTable_succ {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {n k : V} (hk : k < n + 1) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth (ioTable (n + 1)) k = LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth (ioTable n) k
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.znth_ioTable_eq_iotil {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (N k : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                k ≤ N → LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth (ioTable N) k = iotil k
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iotil_eq_ioNext {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {c : V} (hpos : 0 < c) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                iotil c = ioNext c (ioTable (c - 1))

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                iotil recursion equations (Buchholz §4, finite-premise cases) #

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iotil_zAtom {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (s : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                iotil (zAtom s) = 0
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iotil_zIall {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (s a p d0 : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                iotil (zIall s a p d0) = InternalONote.iadd (iotil d0) (InternalONote.ocOadd 0 1 0)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iotil_zIneg {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (s p d0 : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                iotil (zIneg s p d0) = InternalONote.iadd (iotil d0) (InternalONote.ocOadd 0 1 0)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iotil_zInd {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (s at' p d0 d1 : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                iotil (zInd s at' p d0 d1) = InternalONote.inadd (InternalONote.ocOadd (iotil d0) 1 0) (InternalONote.ocOadd (InternalONote.iadd (iotil d1) (InternalONote.ocOadd 0 1 0)) 1 0)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iotil_zAxAll {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (s p k : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                iotil (zAxAll s p k) = oAtomLk (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Bootstrapping.qqAll p)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                õ(Ax^{∀xF,k}) = 2·rk(∀xF) − 1 (Buchholz Lemma 5.2). The atomic axioms read no sub-õ from the table, so the value is closed-form.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iotil_zAxNeg {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (s p : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                iotil (zAxNeg s p) = oAtomLk (inegF p)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                õ(Ax^{¬A,0}) = 2·rk(¬A) − 1 (Buchholz Lemma 5.2).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iotil_zAx1 {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (s C : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                iotil (zAx1 s C) = oAtom1 C

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                õ(Ax^1_{·→C}) = oAtom1 C = 2·rk(C) (Buchholz Lemma 5.2). Tag 7 = the §5 reduct code.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.isNF_iotil_zAx1 {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (s C : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                InternalONote.isNF (iotil (zAx1 s C))

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                õ(Ax^1_{·→C}) is a genuine NF (it's oAtom1 C).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.isNF_oAtomLk_pos {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {C : V} (h : 0 < irk C) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                InternalONote.isNF (oAtomLk C)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                For an L-symbol axiom with a genuine principal formula (rk(C) > 0), the atomic õ is a genuine NF (coefficient 2·rk(C)−1 ≥ 1). Needed for the Lemma-5.2 atomic descent.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.isNF_iotil_zAxAll {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {s p k : V} (hp : LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Bootstrapping.IsUFormula ℒₒᵣ p) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                InternalONote.isNF (iotil (zAxAll s p k))

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                õ(Ax^{∀p,k}) is a genuine NF for a well-formed matrix p (õ = oAtomLk(∀p), rk(∀p) = rk p+1 > 0). The §5 L-axiom-leaf NF fact for the extended ZDerivation (tag 5 base case).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.isNF_iotil_zAxNeg {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {s p : V} (hp : LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Bootstrapping.IsUFormula ℒₒᵣ p) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                InternalONote.isNF (iotil (zAxNeg s p))

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                õ(Ax^{¬p,0}) is a genuine NF for a well-formed p (õ = oAtomLk(¬p), rk(¬p) = rk p+1 > 0). The §5 L-axiom-leaf NF fact for the extended ZDerivation (tag 6 base case).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                iõ-fold over a premise sequence (for the variadic K^r equation), mirror iseqMaxIdg #

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        V

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        iõ-fold over a sequence: iseqNaddIdg ds = #_{i<lh ds} ω^{iotil(znth ds i)}.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Equations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        • GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iseqNaddIdg ds = GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iseqNaddIdgAux ds (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iseqNaddAux_ioTable_eq {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {M ds : V} (hdom : ∀ i < LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds, LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds i ≤ M) (j : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          j ≤ LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds → iseqNaddAux (ioTable M) ds j = iseqNaddIdgAux ds j

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          Table-fold = iõ-fold under dominance (mirror iseqMaxAux_idgTable_eq).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iotil_zK {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (s r ds : V) (hds : LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Seq ds) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          iotil (zK s r ds) = iseqNaddIdg ds

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          The variadic K^r pre-ordinal equation (Buchholz §4): õ(K^r_Π d0…dl) = ω^{õ d0} # … # ω^{õ dl} = #_{j} ω^{õ dⱼ}.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          iord (o) — the full ordinal assignment o(d) = ω_{dg(d)}(õ(d)) (C1c) #

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          The dg(d)-fold ω-exponential tower (iotower, src/InternalTower.lean) over the pre-ordinal õ(d). This is the [KB81] assignment Thm 4.2 descends on.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          source

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          V

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              𝚺₁-Function₁ iord
