                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              instance GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iord_definable' {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {m : ℕ} (Γ : LO.SigmaPiDelta) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              { Γ := Γ, rank := m + 1 }-Function₁ iord
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iord_eq {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (d : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              iord d = InternalONote.iotower (iotil d) (idg d)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              o(d) = ω_{dg(d)}(õ(d)) — unfolds the assignment to the tower over the pre-ordinal.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iord_zAxAll {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (s p k : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              iord (zAxAll s p k) = oAtomLk (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Bootstrapping.qqAll p)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              o(Ax^{C,t}) = õ(Ax^{C,t}) (Buchholz §5: dg = 0 ⟹ o(d) = ω₀(õ d) = õ d).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iord_zAxNeg {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (s p : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              iord (zAxNeg s p) = oAtomLk (inegF p)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iord_zAx1 {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (s C : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              iord (zAx1 s C) = oAtom1 C

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              o(Ax^1_{·→C}) = oAtom1 C (dg = 0 ⟹ o = ω₀(õ) = õ). The §5 reduct's ordinal.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.icmp_ocOadd0_lt {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {a b : V} (h : a < b) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              InternalONote.icmp (InternalONote.ocOadd 0 a 0) (InternalONote.ocOadd 0 b 0) = 0

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Finite-ONote strict comparison: a < b ⟹ ω⁰·a ≺ ω⁰·b (icmp = 0 is <).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.icmp_oAtom1_oAtomLk {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {C C' : V} (h : irk C = irk C' + 1) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              InternalONote.icmp (oAtom1 C') (oAtomLk C) = 0

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Lemma 5.2 atomic descent — ordinal core, L-symbol case. If the principal formula C has rank one more than the reduct succedent C' — which holds for Ax^{∀xF,k} (C = ∀xF, C' = F(k), via rk(∀xF) = rk(F)+1 = rk(F(k))+1) and Ax^{¬A,0} (C = ¬A, C' = A, via rk(¬A) = rk(A)+1) — then o(d[0]) = õ(Ax1_{·→C'}) = 2·rk(C') ≺ 2·rk(C)−1 = õ(Ax^{C,t}) = o(d). This is the entire ordinal content of the atomic descent; connecting it to a concrete iR/Ax1 reduct is the next plumbing.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.icmp_iotil_zAx1_zAxAll {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {s p k : V} (hp : LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Bootstrapping.IsUFormula ℒₒᵣ p) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              InternalONote.icmp (iotil (zAx1 s p)) (iotil (zAxAll s p k)) = 0

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              §5 atomic descent on the genuine codes — Ax^{∀p,k} case. The Ax^1 reduct zAx1 s p (succedent the matrix p, õ = 2·rk(p)) strictly lowers the pre-ordinal below the L-axiom zAxAll s p k (õ = 2·rk(∀p)−1 = 2·rk(p)+1). Needs p a formula (so rk(∀p) = rk(p)+1).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.icmp_iotil_zAx1_zAxNeg {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {s p : V} (hp : LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Bootstrapping.IsUFormula ℒₒᵣ p) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              InternalONote.icmp (iotil (zAx1 s p)) (iotil (zAxNeg s p)) = 0

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              §5 atomic descent on the genuine codes — Ax^{¬p,0} case. The Ax^1 reduct zAx1 s p (succedent p) strictly lowers õ below the L-axiom zAxNeg s p (õ = 2·rk(¬p)−1 = 2·rk(p)+1).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              C3 — Thm 4.2 ordinal descent o(d[n]) ≺ o(d), rule by rule #

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Buchholz Thm 4.2: each reduction d ↦ d[n] strictly lowers o. We prove the per-rule ordinal inequalities directly from the C1 assignment equations and the src/ order theory (Lemma 4.1 monotonicity: icmp_iotower_mono same-degree, icmp_iotower_lt_succ_of_le degree-drop, self_lt_iadd_one). These are the mathematical core; wiring them through a concrete reduction operator iR (Def 3.2) is downstream plumbing.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              icmp a b = 0 reads a ≺ b.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iord_descent_samedeg {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {d e : V} (hg : idg e = idg d) (ho : InternalONote.icmp (iotil e) (iotil d) = 0) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              InternalONote.icmp (iord e) (iord d) = 0

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Same-degree descent template (Thm 4.2, degree unchanged): if dg(e)=dg(d) and õ(e) ≺ õ(d), then o(e) ≺ o(d). The tower height is fixed and ω_n is base-monotone (icmp_iotower_mono).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iord_descent_le {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {d e : V} (hnf : InternalONote.isNF (iotil d)) (hg : idg e ≤ idg d) (ho : InternalONote.icmp (iotil e) (iotil d) = 0) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              InternalONote.icmp (iord e) (iord d) = 0

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              General structural descent (Thm 4.2 non-critical / structural cases): if the degree does not rise (dg(e) ≤ dg(d)) and the pre-ordinal strictly drops (õ(e) ≺ õ(d)), then o(e) ≺ o(d). Composes the strict base-monotone step ω_{dg e}(õ e) ≺ ω_{dg e}(õ d) (icmp_iotower_mono) with the non-strict height-monotone step ω_{dg e}(õ d) ≼ ω_{dg d}(õ d) (icmp_iotower_height_le). Generalises iord_descent_samedeg (the dg(e)=dg(d) case) to an arbitrary degree drop where õ carries the strictness — exactly the LH3 (non-critical chain, case 5.2.2) interface.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iord_descent_dgdrop {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {d e : V} (hg : idg d = idg e + 1) (hnf : InternalONote.isNF (iotil d)) (ho : InternalONote.icmp (iotil e) (iotil d) = 0 ∨ iotil e = iotil d) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              InternalONote.icmp (iord e) (iord d) = 0

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Degree-drop descent template (Thm 4.2, dg(d)=dg(e)+1): if õ(e) ≼ õ(d) (≺ or =) and õ(d) is in normal form, then o(e) ≺ o(d). One extra tower level strictly dominates (icmp_iotower_lt_succ_of_le). The isNF (iotil d) premise is discharged later via ZDerivation (õ of a genuine derivation is a valid CNF code).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iord_descent_I {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {d e : V} (hg : idg e = idg d) (ho : iotil d = InternalONote.iadd (iotil e) (InternalONote.ocOadd 0 1 0)) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              InternalONote.icmp (iord e) (iord d) = 0

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              I-rule descent (same degree, õ drops by one successor): if dg(e)=dg(d) and õ(d)=õ(e)+1, then o(e) ≺ o(d). Instance of iord_descent_samedeg via self_lt_iadd_one (õ(e) ≺ õ(e)+1). Covers Buchholz's I^a_∀xF/I_¬A cases.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iord_descent_zIneg {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (s p d0 : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              InternalONote.icmp (iord d0) (iord (zIneg s p d0)) = 0

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              o(d0) ≺ o(I_¬A d0) — the I_¬A reduction d[0] = d0 strictly lowers o.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iord_descent_zIall {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (s a p d0 : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              InternalONote.icmp (iord d0) (iord (zIall s a p d0)) = 0

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              o(d0) ≺ o(I^a_∀xF d0) at the level of the premise code d0 (the d[n]=d0(a/n) reduct shares d0's dg/õ once substitution-invariance of the assignment is established — a separate brick).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iord_descent_cut {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {d e : V} (hnf : InternalONote.isNF (iotil d)) (hdeg : idg e + 1 ≤ idg d) (ho : InternalONote.icmp (iotil e) (InternalONote.ocOadd (iotil d) 1 0) = 0) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              InternalONote.icmp (iord e) (iord d) = 0

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Cut-elimination descent template (Thm 4.2 critical case, Buchholz Lemma 4.1(b)(ii) case 5.1; judge E-CRUX2-DECOMPOSITION-2026-06-24.md §8.3 N4). The reduct e = d[0] has its pre-ordinal jump up to õ(e) ≺ ω^{õ(d)} (N3b), but the degree strictly drops dg(e) + 1 ≤ dg(d) (N3a). The descent o(e) ≺ o(d) survives because the degree drop absorbs the pre-ordinal jump through the tower: o(e) = ω_{dg(e)}(õ(e)) ≺ ω_{dg(e)}(ω^{õ(d)}) = ω_{dg(e)+1}(õ(d)) ≼ ω_{dg(d)}(õ(d)) = o(d) — icmp_iotower_mono (base) + iotower_omega_pow (base-shift) + icmp_iotower_height_le (height). This is the ordinal tail of the nut; only the object construction iR-critical-branch + the bounds N3a/N3b that instantiate hdeg/ho remain.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              iR — the one-step reduction d ↦ d[0] (Buchholz Def 3.2), rule-by-rule SKELETON #

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              iR dispatches on zTag d. This lap builds the structural (LOW-HANGING) branches — the I_¬A and I^a_∀xF rules, whose reduct is simply the premise d₀ (Buchholz §3.2 cases 2,3; the I∀ substitution d₀(a/0) is invariant for the ordinal assignment, judge §2 LH2, so the skeleton reads the bare premise). The atom/Ind/K^r branches are placeholders (iR d := d) pending: Ind → the K^r-chain reduct (LH4), K^r → the non-critical chain step (LH3/LH5) and the critical branch (the nut, §8.3 — builds d{0}=K^r(i/dᵢ[k]), d{1}=K^r(j/d_j[0]), d[0]=K^{r-1}d{0}d{1}). Flagged in PENDING_WORK.md.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.zTag_le_self {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (d : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              zTag d ≤ d
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              noncomputable def GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iR {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (d : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              V

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              One-step reduction d ↦ d[0] (structural-branch skeleton): I^a_∀ and I_¬ reduce to their premise; other tags are placeholders (identity) until their reducts are built.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Equations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iR d = if GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.zTag d = 1 then GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.zIallPrem d else if GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.zTag d = 2 then GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.zInegPrem d else d
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Instances For

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                𝚺₀.Semisentence 2
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Equations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                • One or more equations did not get rendered due to their size.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Instances For

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  𝚺₀-Function₁ iR via LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.iRDef
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  source

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  𝚺₀-Function₁ iR

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  iR (zIall s a p d0) = d0
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  source

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  iR (zIneg s p d0) = d0

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  iR (zAtom s) = zAtom s

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  iR (zInd s at' p d0 d1) = zInd s at' p d0 d1

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  @[simp]

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  iR (zK s r ds) = zK s r ds

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iord_descent_iR_zIneg {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (s p d0 : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  InternalONote.icmp (iord (iR (zIneg s p d0))) (iord (zIneg s p d0)) = 0

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Descent through iR for the structural rules: o(iR d) ≺ o(d) for I_¬A/I^a_∀xF codes. Composes the iR-compute lemma with the per-rule iord_descent_z*. The atom/Ind/K branches' descent arrives when their reducts are built.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iord_descent_iR_zIall {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (s a p d0 : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  InternalONote.icmp (iord (iR (zIall s a p d0))) (iord (zIall s a p d0)) = 0

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Structural NF building blocks for õ (toward isNF (iotil d) on derivations) #

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  õ(d) is a valid CNF code (isNF) for genuine derivations. The general fact needs structural induction over ZDerivation (the C0 Fixpoint), but the per-constructor NF-closure steps are clean and provable now: õ(atom)=0 is NF, and the K^r #-fold preserves NF given its entries do (isNF_inadd + isNF_omega_pow). These discharge the isNF (iotil d) premise of iord_descent_dgdrop once the Fixpoint lands.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.isNF_omega_pow {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {e : V} (he : InternalONote.isNF e) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  InternalONote.isNF (InternalONote.ocOadd e 1 0)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  ω^e = ocOadd e 1 0 is NF iff its exponent is.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iotil_zero {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  iotil 0 = 0

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  õ(0) = 0 — the out-of-range default code 0 (returned by znth ds n for n ≥ lh ds, znth_prop_not) has pre-ordinal 0. ioTable 0 = !⟦0⟧, whose 0-th entry is 0.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.isNF_iotil_zero {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  InternalONote.isNF (iotil 0)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  õ(0) is NF — discharges the out-of-range-premise NF in the chain ZDerivation wrappers.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.isNF_iotil_zAtom {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (s : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  InternalONote.isNF (iotil (zAtom s))

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  zAxBot (tag 8) ordinal/projection lemmas — all mirror zAtom (deps available here). #

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  source

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  iotil (zAxBot s) = 0

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  InternalONote.isNF (iotil (zAxBot s))

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  iord (zAxBot s) = 0
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.isNF_iotil_zIall {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {s a p d0 : V} (hd0 : InternalONote.isNF (iotil d0)) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  InternalONote.isNF (iotil (zIall s a p d0))

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  õ(I^a_∀xF d0) is NF when õ(d0) is — the assignment is õ(d0) + 1, NF by isNF_iadd_one_right.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.isNF_iotil_zIneg {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {s p d0 : V} (hd0 : InternalONote.isNF (iotil d0)) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  InternalONote.isNF (iotil (zIneg s p d0))

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  õ(I_¬A d0) is NF when õ(d0) is.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.isNF_iotil_zInd {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {s at' p d0 d1 : V} (hd0 : InternalONote.isNF (iotil d0)) (hd1 : InternalONote.isNF (iotil d1)) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  InternalONote.isNF (iotil (zInd s at' p d0 d1))

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  õ(Ind^{a,t}_F d0 d1) is NF when õ(d0),õ(d1) are — the assignment is ω^{õ(d0)} # ω^{õ(d1)+1}, NF by isNF_inadd of two NF ω-powers (the right exponent via isNF_iadd_one_right).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.isNF_iseqNaddIdgAux_lt {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {ds : V} (J : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  (∀ i < J, InternalONote.isNF (iotil (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds i))) → InternalONote.isNF (iseqNaddIdgAux ds J)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Partial #-fold is NF given only the FOLDED entries' õ are NF (∀ i < J, not ∀ n — the weaker in-range hypothesis the K^r structural step actually supplies via premise-membership).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.isNF_iotil_zK {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {s r ds : V} (hds : LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Seq ds) (hNF : ∀ i < LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds, InternalONote.isNF (iotil (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds i))) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  InternalONote.isNF (iotil (zK s r ds))

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  õ(K^r ds) is NF when every premise's õ is NF (chain NF-closure; the missing K^r companion of isNF_iotil_zIall/_zIneg/_zInd). Only the in-range entries (i < lh ds) are required.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.icmp_iotil_ind_reduct {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {a b k : V} (ha : InternalONote.isNF a) (hb : InternalONote.isNF b) (hk : k ≠ 0) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  InternalONote.icmp (InternalONote.inadd (InternalONote.ocOadd a 1 0) (InternalONote.ocOadd b k 0)) (InternalONote.inadd (InternalONote.ocOadd a 1 0) (InternalONote.ocOadd (InternalONote.iadd b (InternalONote.ocOadd 0 1 0)) 1 0)) = 0

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  LH4 — the Ind-rule descent's ordinal core (Buchholz §4 case 4; judge §2 LH4). The reduct d[0] = K^r(d0, d1(0),…,d1(k−1)) has õ(d[0]) = ω^{õ d0} # ω^{õ d1}·k (the k substitution-invariant copies collected into one CNF term ocOadd (õ d1) k 0), and õ(zInd) = ω^{õ d0} # ω^{õ d1 + 1}. The descent õ(d[0]) ≺ õ(zInd) is F1 (left-monotonicity, fixing the ω^{õ d0} summand) applied to F3 (ω^β·k ≺ ω^{β+1}). The k ≠ 0 hypothesis keeps ocOadd b k 0 a valid CNF term.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.isNF_iseqNaddIdgAux {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {ds : V} (hall : ∀ i < LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds, InternalONote.isNF (iotil (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds i))) (j : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  j ≤ LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds → InternalONote.isNF (iseqNaddIdgAux ds j)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  The #-fold iseqNaddIdgAux is NF when every folded entry's õ is NF.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.isNF_iseqNaddIdg {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {ds : V} (hall : ∀ i < LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds, InternalONote.isNF (iotil (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds i))) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  InternalONote.isNF (iseqNaddIdg ds)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  õ(K^r_Π ds) is NF when every premise's õ is NF (via iotil_zK).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iseqNaddIdgAux_const {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {ds β : V} (hconst : ∀ i < LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds, iotil (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds i) = β) (j : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  0 < j → j ≤ LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds → iseqNaddIdgAux ds j = InternalONote.ocOadd β j 0

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  #-fold over a constant-õ block collapses to one term: if every entry of ds (in range) has õ = β, then #_{i<j+1} ω^{õ(znth ds i)} = ω^β·(j+1) for j+1 ≤ lh ds. The Ind-reduct's substituted premises d1(0),…,d1(k−1) all share õ = õ d1 (substitution-invariance, Buchholz Remark p.10), so their #-fold is ω^{õ d1}·k — the left factor of icmp_iotil_ind_reduct (LH4).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  iRepeatSeq — the constant premise block [v, v, …, v] (length k) #

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  The Ind-reduct d[0] = K^r(d0, d1(0),…,d1(k−1)) (Buchholz §3.2 case 4) needs a coded premise sequence. Ordinally, every d1(j) shares õ = õ d1 (substitution-invariance), so the #-fold over the substituted block equals the #-fold over k unsubstituted copies of d1 (iseqNaddIdgAux_const). iRepeatSeq is that constant block — a length-k sequence builder mirroring iwseq/iCTable. (The genuine substituted reduct, needed for derivation validity / derivesEmpty-preservation, layers the eigenvariable substitution on top; this scaffold pins the ordinal side.)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh (iRepeatSeq v k) = k
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.znth_iRepeatSeq {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {v k : V} (i : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          i < k → LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth (iRepeatSeq v k) i = v

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          Every in-range entry of iRepeatSeq v k is v.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iseqNaddIdg_iRepeatSeq {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {v k : V} (hk : 0 < k) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          iseqNaddIdg (iRepeatSeq v k) = InternalONote.ocOadd (iotil v) k 0

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          The constant block's #-fold: #_{i<k} ω^{õ v} = ω^{õ v}·k (for k > 0). The capstone combining iRepeatSeq with iseqNaddIdgAux_const: this is õ of the Ind-reduct's substituted premise block, the right factor of icmp_iotil_ind_reduct (LH4).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iseqNaddIdgAux_congr {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {ds ds' : V} (j : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          (∀ i < j, LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds i = LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds' i) → iseqNaddIdgAux ds j = iseqNaddIdgAux ds' j

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          #-fold depends only on the entries: if ds, ds' agree on the first j entries then their partial #-folds agree. The congruence behind "replace/extend a sequence" reasoning (the chain cases LH3/LH5 and the Ind reduct's seqCons both need it).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iseqNaddIdg_seqCons {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {ds v : V} (hds : LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Seq ds) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          iseqNaddIdg (ds ⁀' v) = InternalONote.inadd (iseqNaddIdg ds) (InternalONote.ocOadd (iotil v) 1 0)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          #-fold over a seqCons: appending v adds the summand ω^{õ v}.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          The Ind-rule reduct object d[0] = K^r(d0, d1(0),…,d1(k−1)) — ordinal side (LH4) #

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          iIndReductSeq d0 d1 k = ⟨d1,…,d1 (k copies), d0⟩ is the reduct's premise sequence (ordinal-faithful: the k substituted copies all carry õ = õ d1, and # is commutative so d0's position is immaterial). Its õ-fold is ω^{õ d1}·k # ω^{õ d0}, and the LH4 descent õ(d[0]) ≺ õ(Ind…) follows from icmp_iotil_ind_reduct (F1+F3). This is the full Ind-rule ordinal descent on a genuine reduct object; only the degree side (idg, awaiting the real irk) and derivation-validity (eigenvariable substitution) remain to lift it to a full iord descent.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          source

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          V

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          The Ind-reduct premise sequence ⟨d1,…,d1 (k copies), d0⟩.
