                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iseqNaddIdg_iIndReductSeq {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {d0 d1 k : V} (hk : 0 < k) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            iseqNaddIdg (iIndReductSeq d0 d1 k) = InternalONote.inadd (InternalONote.ocOadd (iotil d1) k 0) (InternalONote.ocOadd (iotil d0) 1 0)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            õ-fold of the Ind reduct's premise sequence: ω^{õ d1}·k # ω^{õ d0} (for k > 0).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.icmp_iotil_iIndReduct {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {s at' p d0 d1 k : V} (hd0 : InternalONote.isNF (iotil d0)) (hd1 : InternalONote.isNF (iotil d1)) (hk : 0 < k) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            InternalONote.icmp (iseqNaddIdg (iIndReductSeq d0 d1 k)) (iotil (zInd s at' p d0 d1)) = 0

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            LH4 — full Ind-rule õ-descent on the genuine reduct: õ(d[0]) ≺ õ(Ind^{a,t}_F d0 d1), where õ(d[0]) = # of the reduct premise sequence. The reduct's fold commutes (inadd_comm) into the ω^{õ d0} # ω^{õ d1}·k shape, then icmp_iotil_ind_reduct (F1+F3) closes it.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Degree side of the Ind reduct (LH4) — idg-fold over the reduct sequence #

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Mirrors the õ-fold machinery (iseqNaddIdg…) for the degree fold iseqMaxIdg. The capstone is idg_zK_iIndReduct: the reduct K^{rk p}(d0, d1×k) has the SAME degree as Ind^{a,t}_F d0 d1 (because max{rk p, max(dg d1, dg d0)∸1} = max{max(dg d0∸1, dg d1∸1), rk p}, ∸ distributing over max). With degree preserved and õ strictly dropping (icmp_iotil_iIndReduct), iord_descent_samedeg lifts LH4 to a full iord descent on the genuine reduct object — now with the REAL irk.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iseqMaxIdgAux_congr {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {ds ds' : V} (j : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            (∀ i < j, LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds i = LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds' i) → iseqMaxIdgAux ds j = iseqMaxIdgAux ds' j

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            idg-fold congruence: agreeing entries ⟹ equal partial folds (mirror iseqNaddIdgAux_congr).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iseqMaxIdg_seqCons {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {ds v : V} (hds : LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Seq ds) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            iseqMaxIdg (ds ⁀' v) = iseqMaxIdg ds ⊔ idg v

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            idg-fold over a seqCons: iseqMaxIdg (seqCons ds v) = max (iseqMaxIdg ds) (idg v).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iseqMaxIdgAux_const {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {ds c : V} (hconst : ∀ i < LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds, idg (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds i) = c) (j : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            0 < j → j ≤ LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds → iseqMaxIdgAux ds j = c

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            idg-fold over a constant-idg block: if every entry's idg is c, the fold is c (for 0<j).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iseqMaxIdg_iRepeatSeq {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {v k : V} (hk : 0 < k) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            iseqMaxIdg (iRepeatSeq v k) = idg v

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            idg-fold of a constant block iRepeatSeq v k: = idg v (for 0<k).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iseqMaxIdg_iIndReductSeq {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {d0 d1 k : V} (hk : 0 < k) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            iseqMaxIdg (iIndReductSeq d0 d1 k) = idg d1 ⊔ idg d0

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            idg-fold of the Ind reduct sequence: max (idg d1) (idg d0) (for 0<k).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.idg_zK_iIndReduct {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {s s' at' p d0 d1 k : V} (hk : 0 < k) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            idg (zK s' (irk p) (iIndReductSeq d0 d1 k)) = idg (zInd s at' p d0 d1)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Degree side of LH4: the Ind reduct K^{rk p}(d0, d1×k) has the SAME degree as Ind^{a,t}_F d0 d1 (real irk). The K^r degree max{rk p, (max dg)∸1} reshuffles into Ind's max{(dg∸1)s, rk p}.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iord_descent_iIndReduct {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {s s' at' p d0 d1 k : V} (hd0 : InternalONote.isNF (iotil d0)) (hd1 : InternalONote.isNF (iotil d1)) (hk : 0 < k) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            InternalONote.icmp (iord (zK s' (irk p) (iIndReductSeq d0 d1 k))) (iord (zInd s at' p d0 d1)) = 0

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            LH4 — full Ind-rule iord descent on the genuine reduct object (real irk): with degree preserved (idg_zK_iIndReduct) and õ strictly dropping (icmp_iotil_iIndReduct), iord_descent_samedeg gives o(d[0]) ≺ o(Ind^{a,t}_F d0 d1).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            THE NUT — case 5.1 (cut-elimination) ordinal descent on a genuine reduct object #

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Buchholz Lemma 4.1(b)(ii) case 5.1 (E-CRUX2-DECOMPOSITION-2026-06-24.md §8.3). The critical chain d = K^r_Π d0…dl reduces to d[0] = K^{r-1}_Π d{0} d{1}, where d{0},d{1} are the two auxiliary derivations from Theorem 3.4 (the redex (i,j,k) from Lemma 3.1). The reduct's premise sequence is the two-element ⟨d{0}, d{1}⟩. Unlike the structural rules, the pre-ordinal õ may jump up — but the degree strictly drops by one (the only degree-drop in the whole proof; this IS cut-elimination), and the drop absorbs the jump through the tower (iord_descent_cut, the ordinal tail — DONE).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            This section mirrors the LH4 architecture (iIndReductSeq/folds/iord_descent_iIndReduct) on a genuine two-element reduct object: the õ-fold lands on F2 (icmp_omega_pow_nadd_lt, N3b) and the idg-fold on the ℕ-max degree-drop (N3a). The IH facts (õ(d{ν}) ≺ õ(d), dg(d{ν}) ≤ dg(d), N1/N2) and the rank fact r ≥ 1 (from T3.4 rk(A(d)) < r) are the lemma's hypotheses — exactly the Thm-4.2 mutual-IH interface, to be discharged by ZDerivation structural induction downstream.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            source

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            iseqNaddIdg ∅ = 0

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Empty-sequence #-fold is 0.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            iseqMaxIdg ∅ = 0

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Empty-sequence idg-fold is 0.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.znth_iCritReductSeq_one {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (d0 d1 : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth (iCritReductSeq d0 d1) 1 = d1
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.isChainInf_iCritReductSeq {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {s r d0 d1 : V} (hsucc1 : seqSucc (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx d1) = seqSucc s) (hthread0 : ∀ (B : V), inAnt B (seqAnt (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx d0)) → inAnt B (seqAnt s)) (hthread1 : ∀ (B : V), inAnt B (seqAnt (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx d1)) → inAnt B (seqAnt s) ∨ B = seqSucc (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx d0)) (hrank0 : irk (seqSucc (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx d0)) ≤ r) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              isChainInf s r (iCritReductSeq d0 d1)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Critical recombination validity (Thm 3.4(a) → outer K^{r-1} chain). The two-element chain ⟨d{0}, d{1}⟩ underlying the critical reduct d[0] = K^{r-1}_Π d{0} d{1} (Buchholz §3.2 case 5.1) is isChainInf-valid with conclusion s = Π and rank r, given the Thm-3.4(a) end-sequent threading: d{1}'s succedent is Π's succedent (d{1} ⊢ A(d),Π); d{0}'s antecedent threads to Π (d{0} ⊢ Π·A(d)); d{1}'s antecedent threads to Π or to the cut formula A(d) = d{0}'s succedent (the genuine R/L cut on A(d)); and rk(A(d)) ≤ r (Thm 3.4(a) rk(A(d)) < r, here the rank-(r-1) chain reads its cut formula A(d) at ≤ r). This is the validity half of the critical case of RedSound, modulo the genuine reduct supplying these sequents (the current iCritReduct is the ordinal shadow with all-fstIdx d premises — see the Option-B obstruction).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.forall_lt_iCritReductSeq {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {P : V → Prop} {d0 d1 : V} (h0 : P d0) (h1 : P d1) (i : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              i < LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh (iCritReductSeq d0 d1) → P (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth (iCritReductSeq d0 d1) i)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              A predicate holding on both d0 and d1 holds on every premise of ⟨d0, d1⟩.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.zKValidF_iCritReductSeq {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {s r d0 d1 : V} (htp0 : tp d0 = isymRep) (htp1 : tp d1 = isymRep) (htag0 : zTag d0 = 4) (htag1 : zTag d1 = 4) (hsucc1 : seqSucc (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx d1) = seqSucc s) (hthread0 : ∀ (B : V), inAnt B (seqAnt (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx d0)) → inAnt B (seqAnt s)) (hthread1 : ∀ (B : V), inAnt B (seqAnt (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx d1)) → inAnt B (seqAnt s) ∨ B = seqSucc (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx d0)) (hrank0 : irk (seqSucc (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx d0)) ≤ r) (hUf0 : LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Bootstrapping.IsUFormula ℒₒᵣ (seqSucc (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx d0))) (hUf1 : LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Bootstrapping.IsUFormula ℒₒᵣ (seqSucc (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx d1))) (hss : LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Bootstrapping.IsUFormula ℒₒᵣ (seqSucc s)) (hsa : ∀ k < LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh (seqAnt s), LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Bootstrapping.IsUFormula ℒₒᵣ (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth (seqAnt s) k)) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              zKValidF s r (iCritReductSeq d0 d1)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Full faithful validity of the critical recombination chain (Buchholz §3.2 case 5.1 + Thm 3.4). zK s r ⟨d{0}, d{1}⟩ is zKValidF given: the two auxiliaries are Rep-tagged chains (tp = isymRep, zTag = 4, so own-permissibility is automatic and the I/Ax formula-hood conjuncts are vacuous), the Thm-3.4(a) cut-threading (isChainInf_iCritReductSeq), the auxiliaries' succedent formula-hood, and the conclusion-sequent formula-hood. The validity half (RedSound's D₁) of the critical case, isolated as a hypothesis interface for the genuine reduct to discharge.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.zKValidF_iCritReductGen {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {s C rOut rIn0 rIn1 ds0 ds1 : V} (hsAnt : LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Seq (seqAnt s)) (hCrk : irk C ≤ rOut) (hCUf : LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Bootstrapping.IsUFormula ℒₒᵣ C) (hssUf : LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Bootstrapping.IsUFormula ℒₒᵣ (seqSucc s)) (hsaUf : ∀ k < LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh (seqAnt s), LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Bootstrapping.IsUFormula ℒₒᵣ (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth (seqAnt s) k)) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              zKValidF s rOut (iCritReductSeq (zK (seqSetSucc s C) rIn0 ds0) (zK (seqAddAnt C s) rIn1 ds1))

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Critical recombination validity on the GENUINE auxiliaries — threading is AUTOMATIC. When the two auxiliaries carry the genuine Buchholz §2 p.6 / Thm 3.4(a) endsequents — d{0} concludes Θ→A(d) (seqSetSucc s C), d{1} concludes A(d),Θ→D (seqAddAnt C s), with C = A(d) the cut formula — the cut-threading hypotheses of zKValidF_iCritReductSeq hold by construction (seqSetSucc/seqAddAnt read-outs + inAnt_seqCons), leaving only the cut-rank drop rk(A(d)) ≤ rOut (Thm 3.4(a), < r) and the formula-hood of A(d) and the conclusion's antecedent/succedent. The inner ranks rIn0/rIn1 and premise sequences ds0/ds1 are immaterial to the outer chain's validity. This is the validity (D₁) of the critical reduct, modulo only the (banked) rank arithmetic and the auxiliaries being ZDerivations.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              noncomputable def GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iCritReductG {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (s C rOut rIn0 rIn1 ds0 ds1 : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              V

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              The genuine critical reduct d[0] = K^{rOut}_Π d{0} d{1} (Buchholz §3.2 case 5.1), built on the GENUINE auxiliaries: d{0} = K^{rIn0}_{Θ→A(d)} ds0 concludes Θ→A(d) (seqSetSucc s C), d{1} = K^{rIn1}_{A(d),Θ→D} ds1 concludes A(d),Θ→D (seqAddAnt C s), with C = A(d) the cut formula. Unlike the ordinal-shadow iCritReduct, the auxiliaries carry the cut's reduced endsequents — so the recombination's validity threading is automatic (zKValidF_iCritReductGen).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Equations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • One or more equations did not get rendered due to their size.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Instances For

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx (iCritReductG s C rOut rIn0 rIn1 ds0 ds1) = s

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                zTag (iCritReductG s C rOut rIn0 rIn1 ds0 ds1) = 4

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                zKseq (iCritReductG s C rOut rIn0 rIn1 ds0 ds1) = iCritReductSeq (zK (seqSetSucc s C) rIn0 ds0) (zK (seqAddAnt C s) rIn1 ds1)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iseqNaddIdg_iCritReductSeq {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (d0 d1 : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                iseqNaddIdg (iCritReductSeq d0 d1) = InternalONote.inadd (InternalONote.ocOadd (iotil d0) 1 0) (InternalONote.ocOadd (iotil d1) 1 0)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                õ-fold of the critical reduct sequence: ω^{õ d{0}} # ω^{õ d{1}} (N3b's left side).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iseqMaxIdg_iCritReductSeq {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (d0 d1 : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                iseqMaxIdg (iCritReductSeq d0 d1) = idg d0 ⊔ idg d1

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                idg-fold of the critical reduct sequence: max (idg d{0}) (idg d{1}) (N3a's max).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.r_le_idg_zK {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (s r ds : V) (hds : LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Seq ds) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                r ≤ idg (zK s r ds)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                The chain rank r is ≤ the chain's own degree (idg(K^r ds) = max r (…) ≥ r).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.idg_zK_iCritReduct_lt {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {s' r' d0 d1 d : V} (hr' : r' + 1 ≤ idg d) (h0 : idg d0 ≤ idg d) (h1 : idg d1 ≤ idg d) (hpos : 1 ≤ idg d) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                idg (zK s' r' (iCritReductSeq d0 d1)) + 1 ≤ idg d

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                N3a — the cut-elimination degree drop: dg(d[0]) = max{r', max(dg d{0}, dg d{1})∸1} < dg(d). Each component is < dg(d): r' < dg(d) (the reduct rank r-1, from r ≤ dg d), and max(dg d{0}, dg d{1})∸1 < dg(d) (from dg(d{ν}) ≤ dg(d) (N2) and dg(d) ≥ 1). Pure ℕ-max arithmetic once iR builds d{0}/d{1}.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iord_descent_iCritReduct {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {s' r' d0 d1 d : V} (hnf : InternalONote.isNF (iotil d)) (h0o : InternalONote.icmp (iotil d0) (iotil d) = 0) (h1o : InternalONote.icmp (iotil d1) (iotil d) = 0) (hr' : r' + 1 ≤ idg d) (h0g : idg d0 ≤ idg d) (h1g : idg d1 ≤ idg d) (hpos : 1 ≤ idg d) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                InternalONote.icmp (iord (zK s' r' (iCritReductSeq d0 d1))) (iord d) = 0

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                THE NUT (case 5.1 ordinal descent) — o(d[0]) ≺ o(d) on the genuine two-element reduct object. Given the Thm-4.2 mutual-IH facts on the auxiliaries d{0},d{1} (õ(d{ν}) ≺ õ(d), dg(d{ν}) ≤ dg(d)) and the rank-bound consequence dg(d) ≥ 1, r' + 1 ≤ dg(d) (T3.4 rk(A(d)) < r ≤ dg(d)), the reduct d[0] = K^{r'}_Π d{0} d{1} descends: N3b (õ(d[0]) = ω^{õ d{0}} # ω^{õ d{1}} ≺ ω^{õ(d)}, F2) and N3a (degree drop) feed iord_descent_cut (the tower combine, N4).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iord_descent_iCritReduct_chain {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {s s' r d0 d1 ds : V} (hds : LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Seq ds) (hr : 1 ≤ r) (hnf : InternalONote.isNF (iotil (zK s r ds))) (h0o : InternalONote.icmp (iotil d0) (iotil (zK s r ds)) = 0) (h1o : InternalONote.icmp (iotil d1) (iotil (zK s r ds)) = 0) (h0g : idg d0 ≤ idg (zK s r ds)) (h1g : idg d1 ≤ idg (zK s r ds)) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                InternalONote.icmp (iord (zK s' (r - 1) (iCritReductSeq d0 d1))) (iord (zK s r ds)) = 0

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                THE NUT, chain-specialized — the reduct rank is the original chain rank minus one (d[0] = K^{r-1}…, Buchholz §3.2 case 5.1). r ≤ dg(K^r ds) is automatic (r_le_idg_zK); r ≥ 1 is T3.4. So the only genuine inputs are the IH bounds on d{0},d{1}.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                N2 — the "replace-a-premise" fold facts (Buchholz Thm 4.2 IH-lift; judge §8.3 N2) #

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                The critical auxiliaries d{0} = K^r(i/d_i[k]), d{1} = K^r(j/d_j[0]) are the chain d with ONE premise replaced by an ordinally-smaller reduct (N1 IH: õ(d_i[k]) ≺ õ(d_i), dg(d_i[k]) ≤ dg(d_i)). These generic fold lemmas — over two premise sequences ds,ds' agreeing (in õ/idg of entries) except at one index i — give the N2 facts õ(d{ν}) ≺ õ(d) (strict, via F1) and dg(d{ν}) ≤ dg(d) (via max-fold monotonicity), exactly the hypotheses the nut's iord_descent_iCritReduct consumes. The fold-drop is the genuine "left-cancel one summand" content (judge's reusable T2 leaf); definability-free (the arithmetized seqUpdate object that realizes ds' = ds[i ↦ v] layers on top).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iseqNaddIdgAux_congr_iotil {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {ds ds' : V} (j : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                (∀ i < j, iotil (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds i) = iotil (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds' i)) → iseqNaddIdgAux ds j = iseqNaddIdgAux ds' j

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Partial #-fold depends only on the õ of entries (stronger than iseqNaddIdgAux_congr, which needs entry equality — this needs only õ-of-entry equality).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.isNF_iseqNaddIdgAux' {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {ds : V} (hNF : ∀ (n : V), InternalONote.isNF (iotil (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds n))) (j : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                InternalONote.isNF (iseqNaddIdgAux ds j)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Partial #-fold is NF when every folded entry's õ is NF.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.icmp_lt_trans {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {a b c : V} (hab : InternalONote.icmp a b = 0) (hbc : InternalONote.icmp b c = 0) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                InternalONote.icmp a c = 0

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Unbounded ≺-transitivity wrapper over the bounded icmp_trans (bound = max a (max b c)).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.finHead_lt_omega_pow {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {X : V} (hX0 : InternalONote.ocExp X = 0) (hXne : X ≠ 0) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                InternalONote.icmp X (InternalONote.ocOadd X 1 0) = 0

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                A finite-head value is ≺ its own ω-power: ocExp X = 0 and X ≠ 0 ⟹ X ≺ ω^X. The head exponent comparison icmp 0 X = 0 (X ≠ 0) decides the lexicographic icmp_ocOadd outright. Used for the oAtomLk C reduct value (oAtomLk C = ω^0·m, finite head).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.finHead_iotil_lt_iseqNaddIdg {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {ds j X : V} (hj : j < LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds) (hX0 : InternalONote.ocExp X = 0) (hXne : X ≠ 0) (hXval : iotil (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds j) = X) (hNF : ∀ (n : V), InternalONote.isNF (iotil (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds n))) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                InternalONote.icmp X (iseqNaddIdg ds) = 0

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                A finite-head fold-summand value is ≺ the whole #-fold. If a fold entry znth ds j (j < lh ds) has finite-head õ value X = iotil (znth ds j) (ocExp X = 0, X ≠ 0 — e.g. X = oAtomLk C), then X ≺ #_n ω^{õ(znth ds n)}. The summand ω^X rides inside the fold (fold-monotone under inadd), and X ≺ ω^X (finHead_lt_omega_pow); icmp_lt_trans chains them at each fold step (the new summand ω^{…} ≠ 0 keeps every step strict; only the empty-prefix base is settled by finHead).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iseqNaddIdgAux_lt_replace {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {ds ds' i : V} (hlt : InternalONote.icmp (iotil (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds' i)) (iotil (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds i)) = 0) (heq : ∀ (n : V), n ≠ i → iotil (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds' n) = iotil (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds n)) (hNF : ∀ (n : V), InternalONote.isNF (iotil (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds n))) (hNF' : ∀ (n : V), InternalONote.isNF (iotil (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds' n))) (j : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                i < j → InternalONote.icmp (iseqNaddIdgAux ds' j) (iseqNaddIdgAux ds j) = 0

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                N2, õ-side (strict) — the #-fold strictly drops when ONE entry's õ strictly drops and the rest are unchanged (F1 left-cancel). Generic over ds,ds'; the strict-drop entry is i.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iseqNaddIdgAux_lt_of_lt {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {ds : V} (hNF : ∀ (n : V), InternalONote.isNF (iotil (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds n))) (k j : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                j < k → InternalONote.icmp (iseqNaddIdgAux ds j) (iseqNaddIdgAux ds k) = 0

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Prefix õ-drop (strict). Extending the #-fold iseqNaddIdgAux ds by even one more entry strictly increases it (each entry contributes a positive ω^{iotil}), so a proper prefix j < k folds to something strictly smaller (≺). This is the ordinal descent that makes the C-exit prefix sub-chain a valid certReplace reduct: iotil (zK s r (prefix)) ≺ iotil (zK s r ds) whenever the distinguished exit is not the last premise (jstar + 1 < lh ds).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iseqMaxIdgAux_mono {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {ds ds' : V} (hle : ∀ (n : V), idg (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds' n) ≤ idg (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds n)) (j : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                iseqMaxIdgAux ds' j ≤ iseqMaxIdgAux ds j

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                N2, idg-side (monotone) — the idg (max) fold is monotone under entrywise idg-domination.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iotil_zK_lt_replace {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {s s' r r' ds ds' i : V} (hds : LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Seq ds) (hds' : LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Seq ds') (hlh : LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds' = LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds) (hi : i < LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds) (hlt : InternalONote.icmp (iotil (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds' i)) (iotil (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds i)) = 0) (heq : ∀ (n : V), n ≠ i → iotil (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds' n) = iotil (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds n)) (hNF : ∀ (n : V), InternalONote.isNF (iotil (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds n))) (hNF' : ∀ (n : V), InternalONote.isNF (iotil (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds' n))) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                InternalONote.icmp (iotil (zK s' r' ds')) (iotil (zK s r ds)) = 0

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                N2, õ-side at the K^r level — õ(K^r ds') ≺ õ(K^r ds) when ds' replaces premise i of ds by an ordinally-smaller derivation (õ(znth ds' i) ≺ õ(znth ds i)), same length, rest unchanged. This is õ(d{ν}) ≺ õ(d) (judge §8.3 N2), the strict pre-ordinal hypothesis of iord_descent_iCritReduct.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.idg_zK_le_replace {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {s s' r ds ds' : V} (hds : LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Seq ds) (hds' : LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Seq ds') (hlh : LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds' = LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds) (hle : ∀ (n : V), idg (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds' n) ≤ idg (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds n)) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                idg (zK s' r ds') ≤ idg (zK s r ds)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                N2, idg-side at the K^r level — dg(K^r ds') ≤ dg(K^r ds) (same rank r) when ds' replaces a premise of ds by one of ≤ degree, same length. This is dg(d{ν}) ≤ dg(d) (judge §8.3 N2).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                seqUpdate — replace one entry of a sequence (the arithmetized "replace-a-premise", judge T2/T3) #

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                seqUpdate ds i v = ds[i ↦ v]: the sequence ds with entry i replaced by v, same length. This is the code-level operation Buchholz's critical reducts use: d{0} = K^r(i/d_i[k]) is the chain d with its i-th premise replaced by the reduct d_i[k] (iCritAux below). Built as a PR.Construction over a counter copying entries (entry n becomes v when n = i, else znth ds n), so it is a total 𝚺₁ function — the genuine arithmetized object, not a meta-iterate.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                source

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    V

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    seqUpdateAux ds i v n = the length-n prefix with entry i (if < n) replaced by v.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh (seqUpdateAux ds i v n) = n
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.znth_seqUpdateAux_top {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (ds i v n : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth (seqUpdateAux ds i v (n + 1)) n = if n = i then v else LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds n

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Top-entry read-out (the freshly-appended entry at index n): non-inductive, so the ite is fine.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.znth_seqUpdateAux_stable {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {ds i v : V} (n m : V) (hm : m < n) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth (seqUpdateAux ds i v (n + 1)) m = LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth (seqUpdateAux ds i v n) m

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Reads below the top are stable as the prefix grows (the new seqCons doesn't touch index m < n).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.znth_seqUpdateAux_self {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {ds i v : V} (n : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        i < n → LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth (seqUpdateAux ds i v n) i = v

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        seqUpdateAux reads v at the updated index i (once the prefix passes it). ite-free, so the induction's definability side-goal is clean.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.znth_seqUpdateAux_of_ne {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {ds i v m : V} (hmi : m ≠ i) (n : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        m < n → LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth (seqUpdateAux ds i v n) m = LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds m

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        seqUpdateAux is unchanged off the updated index. ite-free.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        noncomputable def GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.seqUpdate {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (ds i v : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        V

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        seqUpdate ds i v = ds[i ↦ v] — the full-length update.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Seq (seqUpdate ds i v)
