                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.seqUpdate_lh {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (ds i v : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh (seqUpdate ds i v) = LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.znth_seqUpdate_self {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {ds i v : V} (hi : i < LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth (seqUpdate ds i v) i = v

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          seqUpdate reads v at the updated index.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.znth_seqUpdate_of_ne {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {ds i v m : V} (h : m ≠ i) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth (seqUpdate ds i v) m = LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds m

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          seqUpdate is unchanged off the updated index (any m, via the out-of-range znth = 0).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.seqUpdate_znth_self {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {ds i : V} (hds : LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Seq ds) (hi : i < LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          seqUpdate ds i (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds i) = ds

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          Updating a premise with its own value is the identity. seqUpdate ds i (znth ds i) = ds for a Seq ds and in-range i — the L-rule replace (red dᵢ = dᵢ) leaves the premise sequence untouched, so the dispatch goal seqUpdate ds i (red dᵢ) collapses to ds. Via Seq.lh_ext: same length, and at every index seqUpdate reads znth ds.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          Splice read-outs (Buchholz §3.2 case 5.2.1): seqCons (seqUpdate ds j a) b #

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          The sub-critical splice reduct expands premise j to two auxiliaries: a = dⱼ{0} replaces premise j in place, b = dⱼ{1} is appended at the end (index lh ds). These read-outs give the spliced premise at every index, the prerequisite for the splice's isChainInf validity (the threading of the appended b).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.znth_seqCons_seqUpdate_top {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (ds j a b : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth (seqUpdate ds j a ⁀' b) (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds) = b

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          The appended premise b sits at index lh ds.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.znth_seqCons_seqUpdate_lt {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {ds j a b k : V} (hk : k < LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth (seqUpdate ds j a ⁀' b) k = LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth (seqUpdate ds j a) k

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          Below the appended slot, the spliced sequence is the in-place update seqUpdate ds j a.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.lh_seqCons_seqUpdate {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (ds j a b : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh (seqUpdate ds j a ⁀' b) = LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds + 1

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          Length of the splice: one more than the original.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          T2/T3 — isChainInf is preserved by replacing a premise with a same-end-sequent reduct #

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          Buchholz's reduction (Thm 3.4(a) / E-CRUX2-DECOMPOSITION §8 leaf T2/T3): the validity structure of a K^r chain (isChainInf: distinguished j₀, antecedent threading, rank bound) depends on the premises only through their end-sequents (chainAsucc/chainAnt = seqSucc/seqAnt ∘ fstIdx ∘ znth). So replacing premise i by any reduct v with the SAME end-sequent (fstIdx v = fstIdx (znth ds i)) leaves isChainInf literally invariant. This is the reusable validity-preservation core of RedSound for the critical (iCritAux-replace) and non-critical reducts.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.fstIdx_znth_seqUpdate {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {ds i v : V} (hi : i < LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds) (hv : LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx v = LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds i)) (n : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth (seqUpdate ds i v) n) = LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds n)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          End-sequent invariance of seqUpdate under a same-fstIdx replacement: every premise's fstIdx is unchanged.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.chainAsucc_seqUpdate {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {ds i v : V} (hi : i < LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds) (hv : LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx v = LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds i)) (n : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          chainAsucc (seqUpdate ds i v) n = chainAsucc ds n

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          chainAsucc is unchanged under a same-end-sequent premise replacement.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.chainAnt_seqUpdate {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {ds i v : V} (hi : i < LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds) (hv : LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx v = LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds i)) (n : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          chainAnt (seqUpdate ds i v) n = chainAnt ds n

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          chainAnt is unchanged under a same-end-sequent premise replacement.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.isChainInf_seqUpdate {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {s r ds i v : V} (hi : i < LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds) (hv : LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx v = LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds i)) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          isChainInf s r (seqUpdate ds i v) ↔ isChainInf s r ds

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          T2/T3 validity-preservation (isChainInf core). Replacing premise i of a chain by a reduct v with the same end-sequent (fstIdx v = fstIdx (znth ds i)) preserves chain-validity isChainInf.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.zKValidF_seqUpdate {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {s r ds i v : V} (hi : i < LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds) (hv : LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx v = LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds i)) (hperm_v : iperm (tp v) (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx v)) (hf1_v : zTag v = 1 → LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Bootstrapping.IsUFormula ℒₒᵣ (zIallF v)) (hf2_v : zTag v = 2 → LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Bootstrapping.IsUFormula ℒₒᵣ (zInegF v)) (hf5_v : zTag v = 5 → LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Bootstrapping.IsUFormula ℒₒᵣ (zAxAllF v)) (hf6_v : zTag v = 6 → LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Bootstrapping.IsUFormula ℒₒᵣ (zAxNegF v)) (h : zKValidF s r ds) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          zKValidF s r (seqUpdate ds i v)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          T2/T3 validity-preservation (full zKValidF). Replacing premise i of a faithfully-valid chain by a reduct v with the same end-sequent (fstIdx v = fstIdx (znth ds i)) preserves faithful chain validity zKValidF, given v's own well-formedness: its own-permissibility (iperm (tp v) (fstIdx v), Buchholz Lemma 3.3, automatic for a ZDerivation) and the tag-gated principal-formula-hood. The isChainInf core is preserved by isChainInf_seqUpdate; the off-index per-premise conjuncts inherit (unchanged znth/chainAsucc), the at-index ones come from v's well-formedness. This is the reusable "replace a premise of a valid K^r chain by a same-endsequent reduct ⟹ still valid" fact for RedSound.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          Splice end-sequent read-outs (case 5.2.1): chainAsucc/chainAnt of seqCons (seqUpdate ds j a) b #

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          The chain-validity ingredients (isChainInf/zKValidF) read the splice chain only through its per-premise end-sequent projections. These resolve chainAsucc/chainAnt at every index of the splice cs = seqCons (seqUpdate ds j a) b: the appended slot lh ds reads b, the updated slot j reads a, all other slots k < lh ds (k ≠ j) read the original znth ds k. They are the prerequisite for the splice's isChainInf/zKValidF validity (deliverable (b) of the lap-86 5.2.1 dispatch).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.chainAsucc_seqCons_seqUpdate_top {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (ds j a b : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          chainAsucc (seqUpdate ds j a ⁀' b) (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds) = seqSucc (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx b)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          The appended half b carries the splice's top succedent.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.chainAnt_seqCons_seqUpdate_top {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (ds j a b : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          chainAnt (seqUpdate ds j a ⁀' b) (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds) = seqAnt (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx b)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          The appended half b carries the splice's top antecedent.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.chainAsucc_seqCons_seqUpdate_lt {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {ds j a b k : V} (hk : k < LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          chainAsucc (seqUpdate ds j a ⁀' b) k = chainAsucc (seqUpdate ds j a) k

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          Below the appended slot the splice's succedent reads the in-place update.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.chainAnt_seqCons_seqUpdate_lt {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {ds j a b k : V} (hk : k < LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          chainAnt (seqUpdate ds j a ⁀' b) k = chainAnt (seqUpdate ds j a) k

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          Below the appended slot the splice's antecedent reads the in-place update.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.chainAsucc_seqUpdate_self {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {ds j a : V} (hj : j < LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          chainAsucc (seqUpdate ds j a) j = seqSucc (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx a)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          The in-place half a carries succedent at the updated slot j.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.chainAsucc_seqUpdate_of_ne {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {ds j a k : V} (hk : k ≠ j) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          chainAsucc (seqUpdate ds j a) k = chainAsucc ds k

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          Off the updated slot, seqUpdate's succedent is the original's.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.chainAnt_seqUpdate_self {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {ds j a : V} (hj : j < LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          chainAnt (seqUpdate ds j a) j = seqAnt (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx a)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          The in-place half a carries antecedent at the updated slot j.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.chainAnt_seqUpdate_of_ne {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {ds j a k : V} (hk : k ≠ j) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          chainAnt (seqUpdate ds j a) k = chainAnt ds k

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          Off the updated slot, seqUpdate's antecedent is the original's.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.isChainInf_seqUpdate_reduceR {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {s s' r ds i v : V} (hi : i < LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds) (hant : seqAnt (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx v) = chainAnt ds i) (hsucc_v : seqSucc (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx v) = seqSucc s') (hX_ant : seqAnt s' = seqAnt s) (hthread : ∀ i' ≤ i, ∀ (B : V), inAnt B (chainAnt ds i') → inAnt B (seqAnt s) ∨ ∃ i'' < i', B = chainAsucc ds i'') (hrank : ∀ i' < i, irk (chainAsucc ds i') ≤ r) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          isChainInf s' r (seqUpdate ds i v)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          R-rule replace — isChainInf succedent reduction (Buchholz Thm 3.4(b), I∀/I¬ non-Rep 5.2.2). When the selected premise i carries the conclusion succedent (so it serves as the distinguished j₀), replacing it by a reduct v with the SAME antecedent (hant) and a REDUCED succedent matching the reduced conclusion s' (hsucc_v), where s' keeps the antecedent (hX_ant), preserves chain-validity — take j₀ = i. The off-i premises and the conclusion antecedent are unchanged, so the threading/rank data up to i (supplied by the caller from the chain's zKValidF + the permIdx/criticality selection forcing i ≤ j₀) transfers verbatim. This is the isChainInf core of the conclusion-reducing replace for an R-rule (tp dᵢ = R_∀xF / R_¬A) selected premise — the genuine cut-elimination step the keep-Π isChainInf_seqUpdate cannot do.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.isChainInf_reduceR_membership {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {s' r ds i v : V} (hi : i < LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds) (hsucc_v : seqSucc (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx v) = seqSucc s' ∨ seqSucc (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx v) = LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Bootstrapping.qqFalsum) (hant_thread : ∀ (B : V), inAnt B (seqAnt (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx v)) → inAnt B (seqAnt s') ∨ ∃ i'' < i, B = chainAsucc ds i'') (hlt_thread : ∀ i' < i, ∀ (B : V), inAnt B (chainAnt ds i') → inAnt B (seqAnt s') ∨ ∃ i'' < i', B = chainAsucc ds i'') (hrank : ∀ i' < i, irk (chainAsucc ds i') ≤ r) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          isChainInf s' r (seqUpdate ds i v)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          GENERAL conclusion-reducing isChainInf at j₀ = i — membership (inAnt) form. The fully general replace primitive that subsumes isChainInf_seqUpdate_reduceR: it threads premise i's (possibly CHANGED) antecedent and the lower premises' antecedents into the reduced conclusion s' directly via membership, rather than requiring seqAnt (fstIdx v) = chainAnt ds i and seqAnt s' = seqAnt s. This is what the FOUR non-Rep cases need: I∀ (succedent → F(0), antecedent kept), I¬ (antecedent GAINS p, succedent → ⊥), axNeg (succedent → p), axAll (antecedent gains F(k)) — Buchholz threads on inAnt, robust to antecedent reordering. hsucc_v = the new premise-i succedent is s''s or ⊥ (the j₀ succedent condition); hant_thread = premise i's new antecedent threads into s'; hlt_thread = lower premises thread into s'; hrank from the parent (via permIdx ≤ j₀).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.isChainInf_reduceR_keepTip {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {s s' r ds i j0 v : V} (hi : i < LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds) (hj0i : j0 < i) (hj0 : j0 < LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds) (hbot : chainAsucc ds j0 = LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Bootstrapping.qqFalsum) (hX_ant : seqAnt s' = seqAnt s) (hthread : ∀ i' ≤ j0, ∀ (B : V), inAnt B (chainAnt ds i') → inAnt B (seqAnt s) ∨ ∃ i'' < i', B = chainAsucc ds i'') (hrank : ∀ i' < j0, irk (chainAsucc ds i') ≤ r) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          isChainInf s' r (seqUpdate ds i v)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          Keep-tip replace (⊥-orbit, replaced premise ABOVE the tip). When the replaced premise i lies strictly above the distinguished tip j0 (j0 < i) and that tip carries ⊥ (chainAsucc ds j0 = ^⊥, automatic on a ⊥-orbit where seqSucc s = ⊥), replacing premise i by ANY v keeps chain-validity with the SAME tip j0 and an ARBITRARY new conclusion s' whose antecedent is the parent's (hX_ant): the new premise sits above the tip, so it never enters the tip-bounded exit/threading/rank. Contrast isChainInf_reduceR_membership, which re-points j0 := i and so demands the reduct succedent be the conclusion succedent or ⊥ and threading up to i. This is the route that frees the ¬-case haux0 from needing redexJ ≤ j0 (PENDING_WORK lap-142/143): when redexJ > j0 the §5 axNeg reduct lands above the tip and is invisible to the tip-j0 validity.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.isChainInf_seqAddAnt {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {s r ds A : V} (hs : LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Seq (seqAnt s)) (hci : isChainInf s r ds) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          isChainInf (seqAddAnt A s) r ds

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          L-rule replace — isChainInf conclusion-antecedent weakening (Buchholz Def 3.2 case 5.2.2, axiom selected premise). When the selected premise dᵢ is a §5 left-axiom (tp dᵢ = L^k_A), the reduct is the IDENTITY (red dᵢ = dᵢ) and the conclusion gains the cut-formula instance A(k) in its ANTECEDENT (tpReduce (isymLk …) Π 0 = A(k),Γ→D). Adding a formula to the conclusion antecedent only RELAXES the threading condition (the threaded B's may now also land in the new antecedent), so chain-validity is monotone: the same j₀ works, with the left disjunct inAnt B (seqAnt s) weakened through seqAddAnt. The premises (ds) and rank (r) are untouched.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.isChainInf_growAnt {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {s r ds i v A : V} (hi : i < LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds) (hs : LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Seq (seqAnt s)) (hsi : LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Seq (chainAnt ds i)) (hsucc_v : seqSucc (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx v) = chainAsucc ds i) (hant_v : seqAnt (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx v) = chainAnt ds i ⁀' A) (hci : isChainInf s r ds) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          isChainInf (seqAddAnt A s) r (seqUpdate ds i v)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          L-rule replace — isChainInf antecedent-growth at an interior premise (Buchholz Def 3.2 case 5.1, critical L-redex). When an interior premise dᵢ is replaced by a reduct v that keeps the SAME succedent (seqSucc (fstIdx v) = chainAsucc ds i) and grows its antecedent by a single head formula A (seqAnt (fstIdx v) = seqCons (chainAnt ds i) A), and the conclusion gains the same A in its antecedent (seqAddAnt A s), chain-validity is preserved with the SAME distinguished tip j0: chainAsucc is preserved at every index (so the tip's succedent and all ranks are untouched), the grown antecedent head A threads to the grown conclusion antecedent, and the surviving antecedent entries thread exactly as in the parent (their prior-succedent witnesses chainAsucc ds i' are unchanged). This is the L-side isChainInf reconstruction for the corrected critical-cut reduct zAx1 (seqAddAnt (cutFormula d) sⱼ) C — it discharges the haux1 threading obligation (O-L2) directly from the parent chain validity, with NO tip recomputation (contrast isChainInf_reduceR_membership, which re-points j0 := i and so needs the reduct succedent to be the conclusion succedent or ⊥ — false for an interior L-redex whose succedent is the cut formula).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.forall_IsUFormula_seqCons {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {Γ A : V} (hΓ : LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Seq Γ) (hpar : ∀ k < LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh Γ, LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Bootstrapping.IsUFormula ℒₒᵣ (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth Γ k)) (hA : LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Bootstrapping.IsUFormula ℒₒᵣ A) (k : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          k < LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh (Γ ⁀' A) → LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Bootstrapping.IsUFormula ℒₒᵣ (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth (Γ ⁀' A) k)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          Antecedent-seqCons formula-hood — prepending a UFormula to a wff antecedent keeps every entry a UFormula. The conclusion-antecedent wff conjunct of zKValidF under the L-rule weakening.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.zKValidF_seqAddAnt {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {s r ds A : V} (hs : LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Seq (seqAnt s)) (hA : LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Bootstrapping.IsUFormula ℒₒᵣ A) (h : zKValidF s r ds) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          zKValidF (seqAddAnt A s) r ds

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          L-rule replace — zKValidF conclusion-antecedent weakening. Adding a UFormula A to the conclusion antecedent preserves faithful chain-validity (Buchholz 5.2.2 axiom case): isChainInf is monotone (isChainInf_seqAddAnt), the per-premise conjuncts and rank are about ds (unchanged), the conclusion succedent is unchanged (seqSucc_seqAddAnt), and the conclusion-antecedent wff extends by forall_IsUFormula_seqCons.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.isChainInf_iSpliceEnd {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {s' r' ds j a b : V} (_hj : j < LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds) (hlast : chainAsucc (seqUpdate ds j a ⁀' b) (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds) = seqSucc s' ∨ chainAsucc (seqUpdate ds j a ⁀' b) (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds) = LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Bootstrapping.qqFalsum) (hthread : ∀ i ≤ LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds, ∀ (B : V), inAnt B (chainAnt (seqUpdate ds j a ⁀' b) i) → inAnt B (seqAnt s') ∨ ∃ i' < i, B = chainAsucc (seqUpdate ds j a ⁀' b) i') (hrank : ∀ i < LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds, irk (chainAsucc (seqUpdate ds j a ⁀' b) i) ≤ r') :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          isChainInf s' r' (seqUpdate ds j a ⁀' b)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          5.2.1 splice — isChainInf structural reduction. The sub-critical splice cs = seqCons (seqUpdate ds j a) b (Buchholz §3.2 case 5.2.1: premise j of the critical chain is expanded into its two halves a = dⱼ{1} in place and b = dⱼ{0} appended at the end) is chain-valid for the conclusion s'/rank r' exactly when the appended half b carries s''s succedent, the antecedents thread back (each B ∈ Γₖ lands in s''s antecedent or a strictly-earlier succedent), and the ranks below the distinguished top stay ≤ r'. This reduces splice validity to the local end-sequent threading facts about the two halves — the cut-formula bookkeeping the dispatch must supply. (Mirror of isChainInf_of_last, with j₀ = lh ds.)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.zKValidF_iSpliceEnd {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {s' r' ds j a b : V} (hj : j < LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds) (hci : isChainInf s' r' (seqUpdate ds j a ⁀' b)) (hperm_a : iperm (tp a) (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx a)) (hperm_b : iperm (tp b) (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx b)) (hf1_a : zTag a = 1 → LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Bootstrapping.IsUFormula ℒₒᵣ (zIallF a)) (hf1_b : zTag b = 1 → LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Bootstrapping.IsUFormula ℒₒᵣ (zIallF b)) (hf2_a : zTag a = 2 → LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Bootstrapping.IsUFormula ℒₒᵣ (zInegF a)) (hf2_b : zTag b = 2 → LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Bootstrapping.IsUFormula ℒₒᵣ (zInegF b)) (hf5_a : zTag a = 5 → LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Bootstrapping.IsUFormula ℒₒᵣ (zAxAllF a)) (hf5_b : zTag b = 5 → LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Bootstrapping.IsUFormula ℒₒᵣ (zAxAllF b)) (hf6_a : zTag a = 6 → LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Bootstrapping.IsUFormula ℒₒᵣ (zAxNegF a)) (hf6_b : zTag b = 6 → LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Bootstrapping.IsUFormula ℒₒᵣ (zAxNegF b)) (hfa_a : LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Bootstrapping.IsUFormula ℒₒᵣ (seqSucc (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx a))) (hfa_b : LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Bootstrapping.IsUFormula ℒₒᵣ (seqSucc (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx b))) (hss : LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Bootstrapping.IsUFormula ℒₒᵣ (seqSucc s')) (hsa : ∀ k < LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh (seqAnt s'), LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Bootstrapping.IsUFormula ℒₒᵣ (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth (seqAnt s') k)) (hperm : ∀ i < LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds, iperm (tp (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds i)) (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds i))) (hg1 : ∀ i < LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds, zTag (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds i) = 1 → LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Bootstrapping.IsUFormula ℒₒᵣ (zIallF (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds i))) (hg2 : ∀ i < LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds, zTag (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds i) = 2 → LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Bootstrapping.IsUFormula ℒₒᵣ (zInegF (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds i))) (hg5 : ∀ i < LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds, zTag (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds i) = 5 → LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Bootstrapping.IsUFormula ℒₒᵣ (zAxAllF (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds i))) (hg6 : ∀ i < LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds, zTag (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds i) = 6 → LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Bootstrapping.IsUFormula ℒₒᵣ (zAxNegF (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds i))) (hcf : ∀ i < LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds, LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Bootstrapping.IsUFormula ℒₒᵣ (chainAsucc ds i)) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          zKValidF s' r' (seqUpdate ds j a ⁀' b)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          5.2.1 splice — full zKValidF reduction. Given the splice's isChainInf core (the structural threading, from isChainInf_iSpliceEnd) plus the per-half well-formedness of the two halves a, b (own-permissibility iperm (tp ·) (fstIdx ·), Buchholz Lemma 3.3 / iperm_tp_fstIdx_of_ZDerivation; the tag-gated principal-formula-hood) and the original chain's per-premise well-formedness, the spliced chain is faithfully valid zKValidF. This is the reusable "splice a premise's two halves into a valid K^r chain ⟹ still valid" fact, the validity half (b) of RedSound's 5.2.1 case. The off-j, below-top conjuncts inherit from the original chain; the at-j (a) and top (b) ones come from the halves.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          Concrete ordered-insert coded-sequence op seqInsert (case 5.2.1) #

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          The genuine in-place splice d₀…d_{i−1} a b d_{i+1}…dₗ as a total 𝚺₁ PR.Construction (mirror of seqUpdateAux): entry n = if n<i then znth ds n else if n=i then a else if n=i+1 then b else znth ds (n−1). Its read-outs (znth_seqInsert_{pre,at,at1,suf}, seqInsert_lh) discharge the abstract read-out hypotheses of the splice-validity specs below.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.seqInsertAux_succ {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (ds i a b n : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                seqInsertAux ds i a b (n + 1) = seqInsertAux ds i a b n ⁀' if n < i then LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds n else if n = i then a else if n = i + 1 then b else LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds (n - 1)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.seqInsertAux_lh {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (ds i a b n : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh (seqInsertAux ds i a b n) = n
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.znth_seqInsertAux_top {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (ds i a b n : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth (seqInsertAux ds i a b (n + 1)) n = if n < i then LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds n else if n = i then a else if n = i + 1 then b else LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds (n - 1)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Top-entry read-out (freshly-appended entry at index n).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.znth_seqInsertAux_stable {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {ds i a b : V} (n m : V) (hm : m < n) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth (seqInsertAux ds i a b (n + 1)) m = LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth (seqInsertAux ds i a b n) m

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Reads below the top are stable as the prefix grows.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.znth_seqInsertAux_pre {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {ds i a b k : V} (hki : k < i) (n : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  k < n → LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth (seqInsertAux ds i a b n) k = LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds k

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Region read-out: pre (k < i), ite-free.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.znth_seqInsertAux_at {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {ds i a b : V} (n : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  i < n → LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth (seqInsertAux ds i a b n) i = a

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Region read-out: at the insert index i.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.znth_seqInsertAux_at1 {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {ds i a b : V} (n : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  i + 1 < n → LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth (seqInsertAux ds i a b n) (i + 1) = b

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Region read-out: at the second insert index i+1.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.znth_seqInsertAux_suf {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {ds i a b m : V} (him : i < m) (n : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  m + 1 < n → LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth (seqInsertAux ds i a b n) (m + 1) = LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds m

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Region read-out: suffix (i + 1 < m + 1, i.e. the original d_m for m > i sits at m + 1).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  noncomputable def GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.seqInsert {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (ds i a b : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  V

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  The full ordered insert: d₀…d_{i−1} a b d_{i+1}…dₗ, length lh ds + 1.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Equations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  • GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.seqInsert ds i a b = GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.seqInsertAux ds i a b (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds + 1)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Seq (seqInsert ds i a b)
