                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth (seqInsert ds i a b) (m + 1) = LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds m
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.forall_znth_seqInsert {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {ds i a b : V} {P : V → Prop} (hi : i < LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds) (ha : P a) (hb : P b) (hP : ∀ k < LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds, P (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds k)) (n : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    n < LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds + 1 → P (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth (seqInsert ds i a b) n)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Every entry of seqInsert ds i a b satisfies any predicate the halves and ds-entries do. The pointwise companion to the validity key: handles the suffix-shift predecessor decomposition once, so downstream lemmas (e.g. the premise-ZDerivation of the 5.2.1 reduct) need no index bashing.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    5.2.1 ordered-insert splice VALIDITY (the genuine, order-sensitive object) #

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Buchholz Def 3.2 case 5.2.1 reduct K^{r'}_Π(i/dᵢ{0},dᵢ{1}) is the ORDERED in-place splice d₀…d_{i−1} dᵢ{0} dᵢ{1} d_{i+1}…dₗ (paper abbreviation: K^r_{Π'}(i/d'ᵢ…d'_m) := d₀…d_{i−1} d'ᵢ…d'_m d_{i+1}…dₗ). Unlike the order-independent end-append model seqCons (seqUpdate ds i a) b used for the #-fold ordinal descent (iord_descent_iSpliceEnd), isChainInf validity is ORDER-SENSITIVE (threads each antecedent only to strictly-earlier succedents), so validity must be proved on this ordered object. Stated abstractly over the insert read-outs (hpre/hai/hbi/hsuf) — the concrete seqInsert op + descent transfer are the remaining 5.2.1 plumbing (see ANALYSIS-2026-06-25-lap87-splice-order-sensitivity.md).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.isChainInf_seqInsert_spec {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {s r r' i j0 ds cs a b : V} (hj0 : j0 < LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds) (hij0 : i ≤ j0) (hAj0 : chainAsucc ds j0 = seqSucc s ∨ chainAsucc ds j0 = LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Bootstrapping.qqFalsum) (hthr : ∀ p ≤ j0, ∀ (B : V), inAnt B (chainAnt ds p) → inAnt B (seqAnt s) ∨ ∃ p' < p, B = chainAsucc ds p') (hrk : ∀ p < j0, irk (chainAsucc ds p) ≤ r) (hlh : LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh cs = LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds + 1) (hpre : ∀ k < i, LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth cs k = LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds k) (hai : LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth cs i = a) (hbi : LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth cs (i + 1) = b) (hsuf : ∀ (m : V), i < m → m < LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds → LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth cs (m + 1) = LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds m) (ha_ant : seqAnt (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx a) = chainAnt ds i) (ha_rank : irk (seqSucc (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx a)) ≤ r') (hb_succ : seqSucc (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx b) = chainAsucc ds i) (hb_ant : ∀ (B : V), inAnt B (seqAnt (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx b)) → B = seqSucc (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx a) ∨ inAnt B (chainAnt ds i)) (hrr : r ≤ r') :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    isChainInf s r' cs

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    5.2.1 ordered-insert splice — isChainInf (abstract spec).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.isChainInf_seqInsert {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {s r r' i j0 ds a b : V} (hj0 : j0 < LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds) (hij0 : i ≤ j0) (hAj0 : chainAsucc ds j0 = seqSucc s ∨ chainAsucc ds j0 = LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Bootstrapping.qqFalsum) (hthr : ∀ p ≤ j0, ∀ (B : V), inAnt B (chainAnt ds p) → inAnt B (seqAnt s) ∨ ∃ p' < p, B = chainAsucc ds p') (hrk : ∀ p < j0, irk (chainAsucc ds p) ≤ r) (ha_ant : seqAnt (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx a) = chainAnt ds i) (ha_rank : irk (seqSucc (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx a)) ≤ r') (hb_succ : seqSucc (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx b) = chainAsucc ds i) (hb_ant : ∀ (B : V), inAnt B (seqAnt (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx b)) → B = seqSucc (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx a) ∨ inAnt B (chainAnt ds i)) (hrr : r ≤ r') :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    isChainInf s r' (seqInsert ds i a b)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    5.2.1 splice isChainInf on the concrete seqInsert — the spec read-out hypotheses discharged by the seqInsert op's read-outs (znth_seqInsert_{pre,at,at1,suf}). The genuine order-sensitive chain-validity of the case-5.2.1 reduct K^{r'}_Π(i/dᵢ{0},dᵢ{1}).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    5.2.1 splice full zKValidF on the concrete seqInsert — the spec read-outs discharged by the seqInsert op. The validity half (b) of RedSound's case 5.2.1 on the genuine ordered-insert object.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    noncomputable def GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iCritAux {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (d i v : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    V

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    The critical auxiliary d{ν} = K^r(i/v): the chain d with premise i replaced by v.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Equations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    • One or more equations did not get rendered due to their size.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Instances For
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iCritAux_zK {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (s r ds i v : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      iCritAux (zK s r ds) i v = zK s r (seqUpdate ds i v)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      iCritAux on a chain code computes to the chain with premise i swapped: same end-sequent and rank, premise sequence updated.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iotil_iCritAux_lt {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {s r ds i v : V} (hds : LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Seq ds) (hi : i < LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds) (hlt : InternalONote.icmp (iotil v) (iotil (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds i)) = 0) (hNF : ∀ (n : V), InternalONote.isNF (iotil (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds n))) (hNFv : InternalONote.isNF (iotil v)) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      InternalONote.icmp (iotil (iCritAux (zK s r ds) i v)) (iotil (zK s r ds)) = 0

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      N2 on the genuine object, õ-side — õ(K^r(i/v)) ≺ õ(K^r ds) when õ(v) ≺ õ(znth ds i) (N1 IH). Feeds seqUpdate's read-outs into iotil_zK_lt_replace.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.idg_iCritAux_le {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {s r ds i v : V} (hds : LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Seq ds) (hi : i < LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds) (hle : idg v ≤ idg (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds i)) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      idg (iCritAux (zK s r ds) i v) ≤ idg (zK s r ds)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      N2 on the genuine object, idg-side — dg(K^r(i/v)) ≤ dg(K^r ds) when dg(v) ≤ dg(znth ds i).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iord_descent_iCritAux {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {s r ds i v : V} (hds : LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Seq ds) (hi : i < LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds) (hnf : InternalONote.isNF (iotil (zK s r ds))) (hlt : InternalONote.icmp (iotil v) (iotil (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds i)) = 0) (hle : idg v ≤ idg (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds i)) (hNF : ∀ (n : V), InternalONote.isNF (iotil (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds n))) (hNFv : InternalONote.isNF (iotil v)) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      InternalONote.icmp (iord (iCritAux (zK s r ds) i v)) (iord (zK s r ds)) = 0

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      LH3 — non-critical chain descent on the genuine reduct object (Buchholz §3.2 case 5.2.2, E-CRUX2-DECOMPOSITION-2026-06-24.md §2 LH3). The non-critical chain reduct d[n] = K^r(i/dᵢ[n]) replaces a single premise i by its sub-reduct v = dᵢ[n]. The degree does not rise (idg_iCritAux_le, N2) and õ strictly drops (iotil_iCritAux_lt, N2 via the N1 IH õ(v) ≺ õ(dᵢ)), so iord_descent_le gives o(d[n]) ≺ o(d). This is the LOW-HANGING structural chain case: no degree drop is needed (õ carries the descent), exactly as Buchholz's §0 non-critical regime predicts. The N1 IH facts (hlt/hle) are the only abstract input, discharged by ZDerivation induction downstream.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      LH5 — the splice reduct (Buchholz §3.2 case 14.254): premise j expanded to two auxiliaries #

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      When a non-major premise dⱼ is itself in the principal case, its reduction splices its two auxiliaries dⱼ{0}, dⱼ{1} flat into the parent chain (Buchholz 14.254): one summand ω^{õ dⱼ} becomes ω^{õ dⱼ{0}} # ω^{õ dⱼ{1}}. Since the õ/idg folds are order-independent (natural sum is commutative; max is commutative), the ordinal descent is faithful on the model seqCons (seqUpdate ds j a) b (replace j by a = dⱼ{0}, append b = dⱼ{1} at the end — same multiset of summands as the in-place splice). The descent is N3b-shaped: F2 (ω^{õa} # ω^{õb} ≺ ω^{õ dⱼ}) + F1 (left-cancel the rest).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.inadd_pow_back {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {Y b w : V} (hY : InternalONote.isNF Y) (hb : InternalONote.isNF b) (hw : InternalONote.isNF w) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      InternalONote.inadd (InternalONote.ocOadd b 1 0) (InternalONote.inadd Y (InternalONote.ocOadd w 1 0)) = InternalONote.inadd (InternalONote.inadd (InternalONote.ocOadd b 1 0) Y) (InternalONote.ocOadd w 1 0)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      ω-power re-association (back): a single ω-power on the left re-associates out of a right-nested ω-power. Avoids the unavailable full inadd_assoc by routing through the insTerm-commute machinery (inadd_omega_pow/inadd_insTerm_comm); valid because one flank is a single ω-power.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.inadd_pow_front {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {P b a : V} (hP : InternalONote.isNF P) (hb : InternalONote.isNF b) (ha : InternalONote.isNF a) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      InternalONote.inadd (InternalONote.ocOadd b 1 0) (InternalONote.inadd P (InternalONote.ocOadd a 1 0)) = InternalONote.inadd P (InternalONote.inadd (InternalONote.ocOadd b 1 0) (InternalONote.ocOadd a 1 0))

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      ω-power re-association (front): pull a common left operand P out front of ω^b # (P # ω^a). Same insTerm-machinery route as inadd_pow_back; lands the two ω-powers adjacent so F2 can fire.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.le_iseqMaxIdgAux {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {ds : V} (J i : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      i < J → idg (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds i) ≤ iseqMaxIdgAux ds J

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      Each entry's idg is ≤ the fold (idg(znth ds i) ≤ iseqMaxIdg ds for i < lh ds).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iseqNaddIdgAux_splice_lt {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {ds j a b : V} (hj : j < LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds) (ha : InternalONote.icmp (iotil a) (iotil (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds j)) = 0) (hb : InternalONote.icmp (iotil b) (iotil (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds j)) = 0) (hNF : ∀ (n : V), InternalONote.isNF (iotil (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds n))) (hNFa : InternalONote.isNF (iotil a)) (hNFb : InternalONote.isNF (iotil b)) (J : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      j < J → InternalONote.icmp (InternalONote.inadd (InternalONote.ocOadd (iotil b) 1 0) (iseqNaddIdgAux (seqUpdate ds j a) J)) (iseqNaddIdgAux ds J) = 0

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      LH5 õ-fold (splice), partial — ω^{õb} # (#-fold of [ds with j↦a]) ≺ #-fold of ds, when both õa, õb ≺ õ(dⱼ). The extra ω^{õb} rides the induction; inadd_pow_back/_front keep it adjacent so F1 (inadd_left/right_mono) + F2 (icmp_omega_pow_nadd_lt) close each step.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iotil_iSpliceEnd_lt {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {s s' r r' ds j a b : V} (hds : LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Seq ds) (hj : j < LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds) (ha : InternalONote.icmp (iotil a) (iotil (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds j)) = 0) (hb : InternalONote.icmp (iotil b) (iotil (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds j)) = 0) (hNF : ∀ (n : V), InternalONote.isNF (iotil (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds n))) (hNFa : InternalONote.isNF (iotil a)) (hNFb : InternalONote.isNF (iotil b)) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      InternalONote.icmp (iotil (zK s' r' (seqUpdate ds j a ⁀' b))) (iotil (zK s r ds)) = 0

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      LH5 õ-side at the K^r level — õ(splice) ≺ õ(K^r ds) for the order-independent splice model seqCons (seqUpdate ds j a) b. The seqCons puts ω^{õb} on the right; inadd_comm flips it to the left to feed iseqNaddIdgAux_splice_lt.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.idg_iSpliceEnd_le {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {s s' r ds j a b : V} (hds : LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Seq ds) (hj : j < LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds) (hag : idg a ≤ idg (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds j)) (hbg : idg b ≤ idg (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds j)) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      idg (zK s' r (seqUpdate ds j a ⁀' b)) ≤ idg (zK s r ds)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      LH5 idg-side at the K^r level — dg(splice) ≤ dg(K^r ds) (same chain rank r), since both auxiliaries dominate by idg: idg a, idg b ≤ idg dⱼ ≤ iseqMaxIdg ds.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iord_descent_iSpliceEnd {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {s s' r ds j a b : V} (hds : LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Seq ds) (hj : j < LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds) (hnf : InternalONote.isNF (iotil (zK s r ds))) (ha : InternalONote.icmp (iotil a) (iotil (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds j)) = 0) (hb : InternalONote.icmp (iotil b) (iotil (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds j)) = 0) (hag : idg a ≤ idg (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds j)) (hbg : idg b ≤ idg (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds j)) (hNF : ∀ (n : V), InternalONote.isNF (iotil (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds n))) (hNFa : InternalONote.isNF (iotil a)) (hNFb : InternalONote.isNF (iotil b)) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      InternalONote.icmp (iord (zK s' r (seqUpdate ds j a ⁀' b))) (iord (zK s r ds)) = 0

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      LH5 — the splice descent on the genuine object (Buchholz §3.2 case 14.254). With õ strictly dropping (iotil_iSpliceEnd_lt, N3b: F2 two-below-one) and idg not rising (idg_iSpliceEnd_le), iord_descent_le gives o(d[0]) ≺ o(d). This is the last structural reduction case of Thm 4.2: with the I-rules (LH1/LH2), Ind (LH4), non-critical chain (LH3), 5.1-nut (iord_descent_iRcrit_of_chain), and now the splice, every Buchholz reduction case has its banked ordinal descent. The auxiliaries' N1 IH facts (ha/hb/hag/hbg) are the only abstract input, supplied by ZDerivation induction downstream.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      LH5 — descent on the GENUINE ordered-insert object seqInsert ds j a b (case 5.2.1) #

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      The iord_descent_iSpliceEnd above is on the order-independent end-append model seqCons (seqUpdate ds j a) b; isChainInf validity needs the genuine in-place object seqInsert ds j a b (lap-87 finding). These lemmas re-derive the ordinal descent directly on seqInsert, bypassing the end-append model entirely (so no permutation/inadd_assoc plumbing is needed). The õ-side is the rotation kernel icmp_iseqNaddIdg_seqInsert: the spliced #-fold differs from ds's only at the distinguished block (entry dⱼ replaced by the two halves a,b), and the common suffix folds on top by inadd_right_mono, so the comparison reduces to the F2 fact ω^{õa} # ω^{õb} ≼ ω^{õ dⱼ} (icmp_omega_pow_nadd_lt) — exactly as in iseqNaddIdgAux_splice_lt, but with b fixed in place at index j+1 and the tail riding ON TOP of it.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iseqMaxIdgAux_le_of_all {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {cs B : V} (J : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      (∀ n < J, idg (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth cs n) ≤ B) → iseqMaxIdgAux cs J ≤ B

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      Generic upper bound on the idg-fold: if every folded entry's idg is ≤ B, the fold is ≤ B.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.icmp_iseqNaddIdg_seqInsert {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {ds j a b : V} (hj : j < LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds) (ha : InternalONote.icmp (iotil a) (iotil (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds j)) = 0) (hb : InternalONote.icmp (iotil b) (iotil (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds j)) = 0) (hNF : ∀ (n : V), InternalONote.isNF (iotil (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds n))) (hNFa : InternalONote.isNF (iotil a)) (hNFb : InternalONote.isNF (iotil b)) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      InternalONote.icmp (iseqNaddIdg (seqInsert ds j a b)) (iseqNaddIdg ds) = 0

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      The rotation kernel — #-fold of the genuine in-place splice seqInsert ds j a b compares = 0 (i.e. ≼) to #-fold of ds. Proved by a J-shifted induction: the prefix <j and the distinguished block (a,b in place of dⱼ) give the base case (F2), and each further suffix entry ds[J] folds identically on both sides (inadd_right_mono). The isNF of the SI partial fold is carried through the induction so no per-entry NF case-bashing is needed.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iseqMaxIdg_seqInsert_le {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {ds j a b : V} (hj : j < LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds) (hag : idg a ≤ idg (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds j)) (hbg : idg b ≤ idg (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds j)) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      iseqMaxIdg (seqInsert ds j a b) ≤ iseqMaxIdg ds

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      The idg-side bound — the idg-fold of seqInsert ds j a b does not exceed that of ds, provided the two halves a,b have idg ≤ idg dⱼ. Same J-shifted induction as the rotation kernel, on the (commutative-idempotent) max-fold.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.idg_seqInsert_le {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {s s' r ds j a b : V} (hds : LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Seq ds) (hj : j < LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds) (hag : idg a ≤ idg (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds j)) (hbg : idg b ≤ idg (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds j)) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      idg (zK s' r (seqInsert ds j a b)) ≤ idg (zK s r ds)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      LH5 idg-side at the K^r level on the genuine insert object — dg(seqInsert) ≤ dg(K^r ds) (same chain rank r).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iotil_seqInsert_lt {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {s s' r r' ds j a b : V} (hds : LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Seq ds) (hj : j < LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds) (ha : InternalONote.icmp (iotil a) (iotil (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds j)) = 0) (hb : InternalONote.icmp (iotil b) (iotil (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds j)) = 0) (hNF : ∀ (n : V), InternalONote.isNF (iotil (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds n))) (hNFa : InternalONote.isNF (iotil a)) (hNFb : InternalONote.isNF (iotil b)) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      InternalONote.icmp (iotil (zK s' r' (seqInsert ds j a b))) (iotil (zK s r ds)) = 0

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      LH5 õ-side at the K^r level on the genuine insert object — õ(seqInsert) ≼ õ(K^r ds).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iord_descent_seqInsert {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {s s' r ds j a b : V} (hds : LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Seq ds) (hj : j < LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds) (hnf : InternalONote.isNF (iotil (zK s r ds))) (ha : InternalONote.icmp (iotil a) (iotil (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds j)) = 0) (hb : InternalONote.icmp (iotil b) (iotil (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds j)) = 0) (hag : idg a ≤ idg (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds j)) (hbg : idg b ≤ idg (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds j)) (hNF : ∀ (n : V), InternalONote.isNF (iotil (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds n))) (hNFa : InternalONote.isNF (iotil a)) (hNFb : InternalONote.isNF (iotil b)) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      InternalONote.icmp (iord (zK s' r (seqInsert ds j a b))) (iord (zK s r ds)) = 0

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      LH5 — the splice descent on the GENUINE ordered-insert object (Buchholz §3.2 case 5.2.1). õ does not rise (iotil_seqInsert_lt) and idg does not rise (idg_seqInsert_le), so iord_descent_le gives o(seqInsert) ≼ o(K^r ds). This is the descent on the object the isChainInf validity (zKValidF_seqInsert) actually lives on — replacing the end-append model iord_descent_iSpliceEnd for the genuine reduct.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.idg_seqInsert_le' {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {s s' r r' ds j a b : V} (hds : LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Seq ds) (hj : j < LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds) (hr' : r' ≤ idg (zK s r ds)) (hag : idg a ≤ idg (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds j)) (hbg : idg b ≤ idg (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds j)) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      idg (zK s' r' (seqInsert ds j a b)) ≤ idg (zK s r ds)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      idg-side bound, RANK-GENERAL — the genuine 5.2.1 reduct has rank r' = max{rk(A(dⱼ)), r}, which may exceed r. The idg bound still holds provided the new rank does not exceed the parent's degree (hr' : r' ≤ idg (zK s r ds)) — which is the faithful situation, since dg(d) = max(r, …) already absorbs every cut rank in the chain.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iord_descent_seqInsert' {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {s s' r r' ds j a b : V} (hds : LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Seq ds) (hj : j < LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds) (hnf : InternalONote.isNF (iotil (zK s r ds))) (hr' : r' ≤ idg (zK s r ds)) (ha : InternalONote.icmp (iotil a) (iotil (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds j)) = 0) (hb : InternalONote.icmp (iotil b) (iotil (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds j)) = 0) (hag : idg a ≤ idg (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds j)) (hbg : idg b ≤ idg (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds j)) (hNF : ∀ (n : V), InternalONote.isNF (iotil (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds n))) (hNFa : InternalONote.isNF (iotil a)) (hNFb : InternalONote.isNF (iotil b)) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      InternalONote.icmp (iord (zK s' r' (seqInsert ds j a b))) (iord (zK s r ds)) = 0

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      LH5 splice descent, RANK-GENERAL (Buchholz §3.2 case 5.2.1 with the genuine reduct rank r' = max{rk(A(dⱼ)), r}). õ is rank-free (iotil_seqInsert_lt); idg is bounded via idg_seqInsert_le' under r' ≤ dg(parent). This is the descent the dispatch's 5.2.1 case invokes.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      noncomputable def GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iCritReduct {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (d i j v w : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      V

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      The full critical reduct d[0] = K^{r-1}_Π d{0} d{1} (Buchholz §3.2 case 5.1), as a genuine code: auxiliaries d{0}=K^r(i/v), d{1}=K^r(j/w) (iCritAux), assembled into a rank-(r-1) chain over the two-element iCritReductSeq.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      Equations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • One or more equations did not get rendered due to their size.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      Instances For
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iord_descent_iCritReduct_object {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {s r ds i j v w : V} (hds : LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Seq ds) (hr : 1 ≤ r) (hnf : InternalONote.isNF (iotil (zK s r ds))) (hi : i < LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds) (hj : j < LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds) (hvlt : InternalONote.icmp (iotil v) (iotil (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds i)) = 0) (hwlt : InternalONote.icmp (iotil w) (iotil (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds j)) = 0) (hvg : idg v ≤ idg (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds i)) (hwg : idg w ≤ idg (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds j)) (hNF : ∀ (n : V), InternalONote.isNF (iotil (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds n))) (hNFv : InternalONote.isNF (iotil v)) (hNFw : InternalONote.isNF (iotil w)) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        InternalONote.icmp (iord (iCritReduct (zK s r ds) i j v w)) (iord (zK s r ds)) = 0

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        THE NUT, fully assembled on the genuine reduct object — o(d[0]) ≺ o(d) for the critical chain d = K^r ds, its reduct d[0] = iCritReduct built from the two seqUpdate-auxiliaries d{0}=K^r(i/v), d{1}=K^r(j/w). The hypotheses are precisely the Thm-4.2 mutual-IH facts on the replaced premises (õ(v) ≺ õ(d_i), õ(w) ≺ õ(d_j), N1) plus r ≥ 1 (T3.4 rk(A(d)) < r). Composes the object-level N2 facts (iotil_iCritAux_lt/idg_iCritAux_le) through the chain descent iord_descent_iCritReduct_chain. The cut-elimination descent now runs end-to-end on real seqUpdate-based codes — only the N1 IH plumbing (structural ZDerivation induction) and T3.4 supplying r ≥ 1 remain upstream.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iord_descent_critical_of_chain {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {s r ds j0 : V} {Tr Fa : V → Prop} {ρ : V → V} (hds : LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Seq ds) (hnf : InternalONote.isNF (iotil (zK s r ds))) (hj0 : j0 < LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds) (hAj0 : chainAsucc ds j0 = seqSucc s ∨ chainAsucc ds j0 = LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Bootstrapping.qqFalsum) (hchain : ∀ i ≤ j0, ∀ (B : V), inAnt B (chainAnt ds i) → inAnt B (seqAnt s) ∨ ∃ i' < i, B = chainAsucc ds i') (hrank : ∀ i < j0, irk (chainAsucc ds i) ≤ r) (hwfR : ∀ i ≤ j0, ∀ (A : V), tp (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds i) = isymR A → 0 < irk A ∨ Tr A) (hwfL : ∀ i ≤ j0, ∀ (k A : V), tp (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds i) = isymLk k A → 0 < irk A ∨ Fa A) (hperm : ∀ i ≤ j0, iperm (tp (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds i)) (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds i))) (hnperm : ∀ i ≤ j0, ¬iperm (tp (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds i)) s) (hdisj : ∀ (A : V), ¬(Tr A ∧ Fa A)) (hFa_rk : ∀ (A : V), Fa A → irk A = 0) (hFa_bot : Fa LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Bootstrapping.qqFalsum) (hNF : ∀ (n : V), InternalONote.isNF (iotil (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds n))) (hρlt : ∀ (n : V), InternalONote.icmp (iotil (ρ n)) (iotil (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds n)) = 0) (hρg : ∀ (n : V), idg (ρ n) ≤ idg (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds n)) (hρNF : ∀ (n : V), InternalONote.isNF (iotil (ρ n))) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        ∃ (i : V) (j : V), i < j ∧ j ≤ j0 ∧ InternalONote.icmp (iord (iCritReduct (zK s r ds) i j (ρ i) (ρ j))) (iord (zK s r ds)) = 0

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        THE NUT, ASSEMBLED END-TO-END on a genuine chain (E-CRUX2 §8.3, case 5.1). For the critical chain d = K^r ds, this composes the three banked pieces into the case-5.1 descent o(d[0]) ≺ o(d):

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        1. L3.1 redex finder (inference_critical_pair_of_chain) — from the isChainInf data + the tp permissibility/truth well-formedness, produces the redex (i,j,k) with 0 < rk(Aᵢ) ≤ r;
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        2. T3.4(a) — 0 < rk(Aᵢ) ≤ r gives 1 ≤ r, the degree-drop premise the reduct needs;
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        3. the object reduct + Thm 4.2 (iord_descent_iCritReduct_object) — d[0] = K^{r−1} d{0} d{1} with d{ν} the premise-i/j reducts ρ i/ρ j, descends since each ρ-reduct lowers õ and does not raise dg (the N1 structural IH, here the only abstract input besides the deferred tp/§5 well-formedness). The chain-structural hchain/hAj0/hrank come straight from isChainInf. This is the case-5.1 descent on REAL seqUpdate-based codes; only N1's IH plumbing (the ZDerivation structural recursion supplying ρ's descent facts) and §5/Lemma-3.3 (the tp well-formedness making the redex fire on a real critical derivation) remain upstream.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        The redex-pair extraction FUNCTION — iR's critical branch as a CLOSED definable object #

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        iord_descent_critical_of_chain produces the case-5.1 descent for the existential redex (i,j). For iR's critical branch to be a closed, total, definable function (Buchholz Def 3.2 case 5.1, which takes "the least such pair"), the redex must be a function of the chain, not just an existential. This section builds that: a first-hit bounded search redexAux over the pairing code c = ⟪i,j⟫, returning the least valid redex pair. The "valid redex" test is stated purely via tp and the pairing projections (tp(dᵢ)=R_{Aᵢ} ⟺ π₁(tp dᵢ)=0; tp(d_j)=L^k_{Aᵢ} ⟺ π₁(tp d_j)=1 with the same cut formula π₂(π₂(tp d_j))=π₂(tp dᵢ)), so it needs no sequent/chainAsucc bookkeeping. The Buchholz reduct then becomes the closed iRcrit d ρ (ρ = the indexed sub-reduct dᵢ[k]/d_j[0], the one honest abstract input = the N1 structural IH / d[n] recursion, deferred).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        def GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.isRedexPair {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (ds c : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Prop

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Valid-redex test on a pairing code c = ⟪i,j⟫: i<j<lh ds, premise i's tp is a right symbol (π₁=0), premise j's tp is a left symbol (π₁=1), and they share the cut formula (π₂(π₂(tp d_j)) = π₂(tp dᵢ)). On such a c, π₂(tp dᵢ) = Aᵢ is Buchholz's cut formula A(d).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Equations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        • One or more equations did not get rendered due to their size.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Instances For
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.redexPair_tp {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {ds c : V} (h : isRedexPair ds c) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          tp (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds (π₁ c)) = isymR (π₂ tp (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds (π₁ c))) ∧ tp (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds (π₂ c)) = isymLk (π₁ π₂ tp (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds (π₂ c))) (π₂ tp (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds (π₁ c)))

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          Redex-pair → tp-symbol shape bridge. From the bare π₁-discriminant pair test isRedexPair ds c recover the genuine inference symbols on the two redex premises: the i-end (i = π₁ c) is a right symbol R_{Aᵢ} and the j-end (j = π₂ c) is a left symbol L^k_{Aᵢ} on the same cut formula Aᵢ = π₂ (tp (znth ds i)) (from the shared-cut-formula conjunct). This is what lets a caller of iord_descent_iRcrit_of_chain' read off the redex premises' tp from the finder's least-pair redexCode (rather than from the existential redex).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          noncomputable def GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.redexAux.blueprint :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.PR.Blueprint 1

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          First-hit search step: keep the prior hit if one was found (ih < n), else take n if it is a valid redex pair, else advance the sentinel to n+1.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.PR.Construction V blueprint

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              noncomputable def GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.redexAux {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (ds n : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              V

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              redexAux ds n = the least pairing code c < n that is a valid redex pair of ds, or n if none.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Equations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.redexAux ds n = GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.redexAux.construction.result ![ds] n

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                source
