                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      noncomputable def LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.iRIndDef :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      𝚺₁.Semisentence 2

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      iRInd d = zK (fstIdx d) (irk (zIndP d)) (iIndReductSeq (zIndPrem0 d) (zIndPrem1 d) 1) (the closed Ind-rule reduct, Buchholz §3.2 case 4 at the count-1 ordinal model).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      Equations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • One or more equations did not get rendered due to their size.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      Instances For
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        instance GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iRInd_defined {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        𝚺₁-Function₁ iRInd via LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.iRIndDef
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        instance GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iRInd_definable {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        𝚺₁-Function₁ iRInd

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        iR2 — the recursive iR (d ↦ d[0]) as a total 𝚺₁ course-of-values <-recursion #

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Lap-71's named architectural blocker. The Buchholz reduction iR is 𝚺₁ by the SAME table reduction as idg/iotil (idgTable/ioTable): iRTable n = ⟨iR2 0,…,iR2 n⟩, the step iRNext d s reading sub-reducts out of s at the premise indices (all < d). The structural branches are CLOSED in d (I∀→zIallPrem, I¬→zInegPrem, Ind→iRInd, atom/axioms→d); the K-branch is the only one that recurses: the critical reduct d[0] = K^{r-1}_Π d{0} d{1} (iCritReduct) at the FUNCTIONAL redex (redexI d, redexJ d), with the two auxiliaries' premise-reducts dᵢ[k] = iR2(znth ds (redexI d)), d_j[0] = iR2(znth ds (redexJ d)) read from s (both premise codes < zK s r ds). This realizes the abstract ρ-supplied iRcrit d ρ at the CONCRETE ρ = fun n ↦ iR2 (znth (zKseq d) n) — the genuine recursive reduct, no abstract input. (For non-critical/splice K-chains the K-branch still emits the critical reduct; the descent-side dispatch selects the right per-case wrapper — a later brick.)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.znth_le_self {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (ds k : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds k ≤ ds

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        A general HFS bound: znth ds k ≤ ds for ALL k (in-range: the read is an element ≤ ds; out-of-range: znth = 0 ≤ ds). Needed to land premise-reads znth ds k inside the length-(zK-1) table.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        noncomputable def GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.zAxReduct {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (d : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        V

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        The §5 atomic-reduct FUNCTION d ↦ d[0] for an L-axiom premise (Buchholz §5, Lemma 5.2): Ax^{∀p,k} ↦ Ax^1_{·→p} (tag 5) and Ax^{¬p,0} ↦ Ax^1_{·→p} (tag 6) — the principal formula stripped to its rank-one-lower matrix. Identity off the atomic-axiom tags. This is the j-component the K-case critical reduction installs (in iRNext/iCritReduct tag-4) instead of the table lookup iR2(premⱼ), which is the identity on axioms (iR2_zAxAll/iR2_zAxNeg) and so yields NO õ-drop on the j-side.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Equations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        • One or more equations did not get rendered due to their size.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Instances For
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.zAxReduct_zAxAll {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (s p k : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          zAxReduct (zAxAll s p k) = zAx1 s p
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.zAxReduct_zAxNeg {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (s p : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          zAxReduct (zAxNeg s p) = zAx1 s p
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          noncomputable def LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.zAxReductDef :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          𝚺₁.Semisentence 2

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          Σ₁-definability of zAxReduct (zAxAllF d = π₁(zRest d), zAxNegF d = zRest d; zAx1 via its graph). The arithmetization that lets zAxReduct thread through the iRNext/iCritReduct tag-4 definition.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            V

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Table step of iR2: iR2 d from s = ⟨iR2 0,…,iR2 (d-1)⟩, dispatching on zTag d.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    noncomputable def GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iRTable {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (n : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    V

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    The iR2 table: iRTable n = ⟨iR2 0,…,iR2 n⟩ (length n+1).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Equations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    • GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iRTable n = GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iRTable.construction.result ![] n

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iRTable_zero {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      iRTable 0 = !⟦0⟧
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iRTable_succ {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (n : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      iRTable (n + 1) = iRTable n ⁀' iRNext (n + 1) (iRTable n)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      source

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        V

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            𝚺₁-Function₁ iR2 via LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.iR2Def

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            𝚺₁-Function₁ iR2
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            instance GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iR2_definable' {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {m : ℕ} (Γ : LO.SigmaPiDelta) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            { Γ := Γ, rank := m + 1 }-Function₁ iR2

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            The STRIPPED cut formula A(d) (Buchholz Thm 3.4(a)) — the rank-strict critical reduct #

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Buchholz Thm 3.4(a) cuts the critical reduct on the stripped subformula A(d), not on the principal A_i = chainAsucc (zKseq d) (redexI d): for A_i = ∀xF the cut formula is the L-instance F(k) (k read off the L^k_{A_i} redex premise redexJ), and rk(F(k)) < rk(∀xF) ≤ r; for A_i = ¬A = inegF A it is A, and rk(A) < rk(¬A) ≤ r. This strict drop (< r, vs the principal's non-strict ≤ r) is exactly what the splice rank bound hr' and the critical-soundness hCrk need (lap-110 root cause). cutFormula computes it; irk_cutFormula_lt is the strict bound.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.tp_isymLk_form {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {d k A : V} (h : tp d = isymLk k A) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            (∃ (p : V), A = LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Bootstrapping.qqAll p) ∨ ∃ (p : V), A = inegF p

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            The inference-symbol shape forces the cut formula A_i of an L^k_{A_i} redex premise to be either ∀xF (tag-5 axiom) or ¬A = inegF A (tag-6 axiom): the only two tp-cases that emit an isymLk.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            noncomputable def GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.cutFormula {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (d : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            V

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            The stripped cut formula A(d). A_i := chainAsucc (zKseq d) (redexI d) (principal of the R-redex premise). If A_i = ∀xF (π₁(A_i−1) = 6, the qqAll tag) then A(d) = F(k) with the instance k = π₁(π₂(tp d_redexJ)) read off the L^k premise; else (A_i = ¬A) A(d) = A.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Equations

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              noncomputable def LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.cutFormulaDef :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              𝚺₁.Semisentence 2

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              𝚺₁ graph of cutFormula (template tpReduceDef): dispatch on the qqAll tag π₁(A_i−1) = 6, the ∀-branch substituting the numeral of the L^k instance into the matrix.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                𝚺₁-Function₁ cutFormula via LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.cutFormulaDef

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                𝚺₁-Function₁ cutFormula
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                instance GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.cutFormula_definable' {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {m : ℕ} (Γ : LO.SigmaPiDelta) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                { Γ := Γ, rank := m + 1 }-Function₁ cutFormula
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.cutFormula_all {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {d p : V} (hA : chainAsucc (zKseq d) (redexI d) = LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Bootstrapping.qqAll p) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                cutFormula d = LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Bootstrapping.substs1 ℒₒᵣ (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Bootstrapping.Arithmetic.numeral (π₁ π₂ tp (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth (zKseq d) (redexJ d)))) p

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                ∀-case readout: when the principal is ∀xF, the stripped cut formula is the instance F(k).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.cutFormula_neg {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {d p : V} (hp : LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Bootstrapping.IsUFormula ℒₒᵣ p) (hA : chainAsucc (zKseq d) (redexI d) = inegF p) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                cutFormula d = p

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                ¬-case readout: when the principal is ¬A = inegF A (with A a UFormula), the stripped cut formula is A.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.tp_isymR_form_wff {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {d A : V} (hZ : ZDerivation d) (h : tp d = isymR A) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                (∃ (p : V), A = LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Bootstrapping.qqAll p ∧ LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Bootstrapping.IsSemiformula ℒₒᵣ 1 p) ∨ ∃ (p : V), A = inegF p ∧ LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Bootstrapping.IsUFormula ℒₒᵣ p

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                The R-redex premise carries the cut formula's well-formedness. A genuine ZDerivation whose tp is a right symbol R_A introduces A by an I∀ (tag 1) or I¬ (tag 2) rule, so A = ∀xF with the matrix IsSemiformula ℒₒᵣ 1 F (from zIallWff) or A = ¬B = inegF B with IsUFormula B (from zInegWff). This is where the closedness the substitution rank lemma needs comes from — it is NOT in the (IsUFormula-only) chain validity, but in the I-rule premise's side condition.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.zDerivation_isymR_form {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {d A : V} (hZ : ZDerivation d) (h : tp d = isymR A) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                (∃ (s : V) (a : V) (p : V) (d0 : V), d = zIall s a p d0 ∧ A = LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Bootstrapping.qqAll p) ∨ ∃ (s : V) (p : V) (d0 : V), d = zIneg s p d0 ∧ A = inegF p

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                R-redex constructor form. A ZDerivation whose tp is a right symbol R_A is exactly an I∀ (zIall, A = ∀p) or I¬ (zIneg, A = ¬p) rule — the explicit constructor the corrected reduct critReductCorr/critReductNeg needs (tp_isymR_form_wff gives only the formula, not the node).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.zDerivation_isymLk_form {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {d k A : V} (hZ : ZDerivation d) (h : tp d = isymLk k A) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                (∃ (s : V) (p : V), d = zAxAll s p k ∧ A = LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Bootstrapping.qqAll p) ∨ ∃ (s : V) (p : V), d = zAxNeg s p ∧ k = 0 ∧ A = inegF p

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                L-redex constructor form. A ZDerivation whose tp is a left symbol L^k_A is exactly an axAll (zAxAll s p k, A = ∀p) or axNeg (zAxNeg s p, k = 0, A = ¬p) axiom. The explicit constructor the corrected L-reduct Ax^1 needs.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.irk_cutFormula_lt {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {d r : V} (hZi : ZDerivation (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth (zKseq d) (redexI d))) (hRi : tp (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth (zKseq d) (redexI d)) = isymR (chainAsucc (zKseq d) (redexI d))) (hrank : irk (chainAsucc (zKseq d) (redexI d)) ≤ r) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                irk (cutFormula d) < r

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                T3.4(a) strict rank bound for the stripped cut formula — fully self-contained. From the R-redex premise dᵢ being a ZDerivation (hZi) with tp dᵢ = R_{A_i} (hRi, A_i = chainAsucc …) of rank ≤ r (hrank), the stripped cut formula has rank strictly below r: rk(F(k)) < rk(∀xF) ≤ r / rk(A) < rk(¬A) ≤ r. The matrix closedness (IsSemiformula 1) needed for the ∀-case substitution rank invariance is supplied by tp_isymR_form_wff (the I∀ premise's zIallWff), NOT by any external hypothesis — so this dissolves the lap-110/112 closedness gap on the descent context. This is the degree drop the principal cut formula (≤ r, non-strict) fails to give (lap-110 root cause).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                noncomputable def GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iRcritG {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (d : V) (ρ : V → V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                V

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                The genuine closed critical branch for red's tag-4 case: K^{r-1}_Π ⟨d{0}, d{1}⟩ where the cut formula is A(d) = chainAsucc (zKseq d) (redexI d), the auxiliaries replace the redex premises i = redexI d, j = redexJ d by their ρ-reducts, and carry the reduced endsequents. Closed term; only ρ (the N1 IH) is abstract. (Soundness ZDerivation_iRcritG_of is proved later, after ZDerivation_iCritReductG_of.)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Equations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                • One or more equations did not get rendered due to their size.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Instances For
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.fstIdx_iRcritG {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (d : V) (ρ : V → V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx (iRcritG d ρ) = LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx d
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.zTag_iRcritG {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (d : V) (ρ : V → V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  zTag (iRcritG d ρ) = 4
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  noncomputable def GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iRcritGNeg {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (d : V) (ρ : V → V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  V

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  The SWAPPED-half critical reduct — the ¬-case constructor (Buchholz Def 3.2 case 5.1, subcase Aᵢ = ¬A). For a critical cut on a NEGATION ¬A the two auxiliary half-derivations are assigned to the OPPOSITE redex premises from the ∀-case (Buchholz's d{0} := K^r_{Π.A(d)}(j/dⱼ[0]), d{1} := K^r_{A(d),Π}(i/dᵢ[0]) for Aᵢ = ¬A):

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  • d{0} (the SUCCEDENT half Π.A(d), conclusion Γ→A) replaces the L-redex j (the axNeg axiom, whose §5 reduct dⱼ[0] derives Γⱼ→A), and
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  • d{1} (the ANTECEDENT half A(d),Π, conclusion A,Γ→⊥) replaces the R-redex i (the I¬ rule, whose reduct dᵢ[0] = d₀ derives A,Γᵢ→⊥). This is exactly iRcritG with redexI/redexJ swapped in the two seqUpdate slots. Since iCritReductG is symmetric in its ordinal (# is commutative), the ordinal DESCENT is SHARED with iRcritG/iRcrit; only SOUNDNESS distinguishes the two polarities, which is why the engine red (descent-keyed) survives the distinction but the inversion ZDerivation_red_zK_crit needs the polarity-correct constructor.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Equations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  • One or more equations did not get rendered due to their size.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.fstIdx_iRcritGNeg {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (d : V) (ρ : V → V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx (iRcritGNeg d ρ) = LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx d
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.zTag_iRcritGNeg {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (d : V) (ρ : V → V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    zTag (iRcritGNeg d ρ) = 4

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    The 5.1 critical-reduct dispatch helper iRKc (Buchholz Def 3.2 case 5.1) #

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    The standalone 5.1 case — exactly the (table-supplied) critical reduct the original iRNextG tag-4 inlined: iRcritG d ρ with ρ idx = zAxReduct (znth s (znth (zKseq d) idx)) (the per-premise reduct read from the table s). Extracted as a definable function so the dispatched iRK is three clean function-application atoms (iRKc / iRKs / iRKr).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    noncomputable def GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iRKc {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (d s : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    V

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx (iRKc d s) = LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx d
