                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.zTag_iRKc {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (d s : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      zTag (iRKc d s) = 4
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      noncomputable def LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.iRKcDef :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      𝚺₁.Semisentence 3
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      Equations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • One or more equations did not get rendered due to their size.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      Instances For
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        instance GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iRKc_defined {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        𝚺₁-Function₂ iRKc via LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.iRKcDef
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        instance GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iRKc_definable {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        𝚺₁-Function₂ iRKc

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        The tag-4 DISPATCH iRK (Buchholz Def 3.2 case 5: 5.1 / 5.2.1 / 5.2.2) #

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        The genuine tag-4 reduct dispatches on criticality (lap-86 finding not_zKCritical_red_zK: the critical-only reduct is itself non-critical after one step, so the dispatch is mandatory). We branch on the sentinel comparison permIdx d < lh (zKseq d) rather than the Δ₁ relation zKCritical: permIdx d = lh (zKseq d) ⟺ no permissible premise ⟺ the chain is critical (permIdxAux_eq_self_of_none), and permIdx d < lh (zKseq d) ⟺ non-critical with permIdx d the least permissible premise (permIdxAux_isPermPrem_of_lt). A Δ₀ comparison of definable values — far cleaner to make 𝚺₁ than embedding zKCriticalDef. The sub-dispatch (5.2.1 splice vs 5.2.2 replace) tests the same sentinel on the selected premise dᵢ = znth (zKseq d) (permIdx d): dᵢ critical → 5.2.1 (iRKs), else 5.2.2 (iRKr).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        noncomputable def GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iRK {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (d s : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        V
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Equations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        • One or more equations did not get rendered due to their size.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.fstIdx_iRKr {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (d s : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx (iRKr d s) = tpReduce (tp (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth (zKseq d) (permIdx d))) (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx d) 0

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            5.2.2 reduct conclusion (route B, lap 96) — the reduced sequent tpReduce (tp dᵢ) (fstIdx d) 0.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.fstIdx_iRKs {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (d s : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx (iRKs d s) = LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx d
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.zTag_iRKr {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (d s : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            zTag (iRKr d s) = 4
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.zTag_iRKs {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (d s : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            zTag (iRKs d s) = 4
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.fstIdx_iRKr_of_Rep {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {d s : V} (htp : tp (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth (zKseq d) (permIdx d)) = isymRep) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx (iRKr d s) = LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx d

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Replace-reduct keeps Π for a Rep selected premise. When tp dᵢ = Rep (e.g. on the ⊥-orbit by Cor 2.1) tpReduce is the identity, so the 5.2.2 reduct keeps the conclusion — recovering the old unconditional fstIdx_iRKr.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.fstIdx_iRK_of_Rep {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {d s : V} (htp : permIdx d < LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh (zKseq d) → ¬(zTag (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth (zKseq d) (permIdx d)) = 4 ∧ ¬permIdx (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth (zKseq d) (permIdx d)) < LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh (zKseq (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth (zKseq d) (permIdx d)))) → tp (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth (zKseq d) (permIdx d)) = isymRep) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx (iRK d s) = LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx d

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Dispatch invariant — iRK keeps the conclusion sequent off the non-Rep replace case. The 5.1 (iRKc) and 5.2.1 (iRKs) branches always keep Π; the 5.2.2 (iRKr) branch keeps Π exactly when the selected premise is Rep (the conclusion-reduction case is the one route-B addition). On the ⊥-orbit all selected premises are Rep (Cor 2.1), so iRK keeps Π there.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.zTag_iRK {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (d s : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            zTag (iRK d s) = 4

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Dispatch invariant — iRK is a K-chain (tag 4) in every branch.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            The GENUINE reduct red (Buchholz §6 red / Def 3.2) — replaces the dead iR2 #

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            red is the validity-faithful reduct: identical to iR2 on the I-rules (tags 1,2) and the Ind rule (tag 3), but its critical K-case (tag 4) is iRcritG (the genuine recombination on the CORRECT reduced endsequents Θ→A(d)/A(d),Θ→D) instead of iR2's ordinal-shadow iCritReduct. Built by the same table recursion as iR2 (iRNextG/redTable/red), so red is total + 𝚺₁-definable.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            fvSubstSeq — map fvSubst a t over a coded formula sequence #

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Mirrors tpSeqAux/iseqMaxAux: a PR.Construction over a length counter, with the pair ⟪a, t⟫ as a single parameter (projected by π₁/π₂) plus the source sequence Γ.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            source

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.PR.Blueprint 2
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Equations

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                V

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                fvSubstSeqAux ⟪a,t⟫ Γ n = ⟨fvSubst a t (znth Γ 0),…,fvSubst a t (znth Γ (n−1))⟩ (length n).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh (fvSubstSeq a t Γ) = LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh Γ

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.znth_fvSubstSeq {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {a t Γ i : V} (hi : i < LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh Γ) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth (fvSubstSeq a t Γ) i = LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Bootstrapping.fvSubst ℒₒᵣ a t (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth Γ i)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Read-out: the i-th formula of fvSubstSeq a t Γ is fvSubst a t of the i-th of Γ.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        fvSubstSeqt — substitute a whole sequent s = ⟪Γ, C⟫ #

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        The antecedent Γ = seqAnt s is a sequence of formulas (mapped by fvSubstSeq); the succedent C = seqSucc s is a single formula (mapped by fvSubst).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        noncomputable def GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.fvSubstSeqt {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (a t s : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        V

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Substitute ^&a ↦ t throughout the sequent s = ⟪Γ, C⟫.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Equations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        • One or more equations did not get rendered due to their size.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.seqSucc_fvSubstSeqt {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (a t s : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            seqSucc (fvSubstSeqt a t s) = LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Bootstrapping.fvSubst ℒₒᵣ a t (seqSucc s)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            tblMapSeq — map a value-table read over a premise sequence (the zK case) #

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            For the chain rule zK s r ds, zsubst rebuilds the premise sequence by reading each (already substituted) premise out of the recursion table: tblMapSeq tbl ds = ⟨znth tbl (znth ds 0),…⟩. Mirrors iseqMaxAux (params tbl, ds) but collects via seqCons instead of max.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            def GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.tblMapSeqAux.blueprint :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.PR.Blueprint 2
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Equations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            • One or more equations did not get rendered due to their size.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Instances For

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.PR.Construction V blueprint

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                noncomputable def GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.tblMapSeqAux {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (tbl ds n : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                V

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                tblMapSeqAux tbl ds n = ⟨znth tbl (znth ds 0),…,znth tbl (znth ds (n−1))⟩ (length n).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Equations

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  tblMapSeqAux tbl ds 0 = ∅

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  tblMapSeqAux tbl ds (n + 1) = tblMapSeqAux tbl ds n ⁀' LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth tbl (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds n)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              zsubstNext — the table step of zsubst #

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Reads each (already substituted) child out of the value-table s (every child code < d), and rebuilds the constructor with the substituted end-sequent fvSubstSeqt a t (fstIdx d), substituted principal formula(s) (fvSubst), substituted induction term (termFvSubst), and the eigenvariable index left intact. Mirrors iRNext.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              noncomputable def GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.zsubstNext {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (d s a t : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              V
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Equations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • One or more equations did not get rendered due to their size.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Instances For
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                source

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Equations

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  𝚺₁-Function₄ zsubstNext via LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.zsubstNextDef
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  instance GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.zsubstNext_definable {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  𝚺₁-Function₄ zsubstNext

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  zsubst — the course-of-values <-recursion (mirror iRTable/iR2) #

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  zsubstTable a t n = ⟨zsubst 0,…,zsubst n⟩, with the step reading sub-reducts out of ih (each child code < d); zsubst d a t = znth (zsubstTable a t d) d.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  noncomputable def GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.zsubstTable.blueprint :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.PR.Blueprint 2
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Equations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  • One or more equations did not get rendered due to their size.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Instances For
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    noncomputable def GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.zsubstTable.construction {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.PR.Construction V blueprint
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Equations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    • One or more equations did not get rendered due to their size.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      noncomputable def GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.zsubstTable {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (a t n : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      V

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      zsubstTable a t n = ⟨zsubst 0,…,zsubst n⟩ (length n+1).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      Equations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.zsubstTable a t n = GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.zsubstTable.construction.result ![a, t] n
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      Instances For
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.zsubstTable_zero {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (a t : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        zsubstTable a t 0 = !⟦0⟧
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.zsubstTable_succ {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (a t n : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        zsubstTable a t (n + 1) = zsubstTable a t n ⁀' zsubstNext (n + 1) (zsubstTable a t n) a t
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        noncomputable def LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.zsubstTableDef :

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          noncomputable def GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.zsubst {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (d a t : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          V

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          Eigenvariable substitution on Z-derivations: replace ^&a by the coded term t throughout the Z-derivation code d (the d-th entry of the value-table).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          Equations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          • GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.zsubst d a t = LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth (GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.zsubstTable a t d) d
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          Instances For

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              noncomputable def GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iRNextG {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (d s : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              V

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Table step of red: dispatch on zTag d; tag-4 = the genuine Buchholz Def-3.2 case-5 DISPATCH iRK (5.1 critical / 5.2.1 splice / 5.2.2 replace), reading per-premise reducts from the table s.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Equations
