                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      noncomputable def GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.redTable {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (n : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      V

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      The red table: redTable n = ⟨red 0,…,red n⟩ (length n+1).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      Equations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.redTable n = GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.redTable.construction.result ![] n
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      Instances For
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.redTable_zero {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        redTable 0 = !⟦0⟧
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.redTable_succ {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (n : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        redTable (n + 1) = redTable n ⁀' iRNextG (n + 1) (redTable n)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        noncomputable def LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.redTableDef :

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          noncomputable def GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.red {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (d : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          V

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          The genuine reduct red d = d[0]: the d-th entry of the table.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          Equations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          • GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.red d = LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth (GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.redTable d) d

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            source

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              instance GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.red_defined {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              𝚺₁-Function₁ red via LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.redDef

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              𝚺₁-Function₁ red
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              instance GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.red_definable' {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {m : ℕ} (Γ : LO.SigmaPiDelta) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              { Γ := Γ, rank := m + 1 }-Function₁ red

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Structural correctness of the red table (mirror iR2) #

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.redTable_seq {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (n : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Seq (redTable n)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.redTable_lh {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (n : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh (redTable n) = n + 1
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.znth_redTable_succ {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {n k : V} (hk : k < n + 1) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth (redTable (n + 1)) k = LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth (redTable n) k
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.znth_redTable_eq_red {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (N k : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              k ≤ N → LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth (redTable N) k = red k
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.red_eq_iRNextG {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {c : V} (hpos : 0 < c) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              red c = iRNextG c (redTable (c - 1))

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              red c = iRNextG c (redTable (c-1)) for positive codes (the table-reduction unfolding).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iRcritG_congr {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {d : V} {ρ ρ' : V → V} (hi : ρ (redexI d) = ρ' (redexI d)) (hj : ρ (redexJ d) = ρ' (redexJ d)) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              iRcritG d ρ = iRcritG d ρ'

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              iRcritG depends on ρ only at redexI d/redexJ d.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              red recursion equations (Buchholz Def 3.2, per rule) #

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.red_zAtom {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (s : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              red (zAtom s) = zAtom s
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.red_zIall {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (s a p d0 : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              red (zIall s a p d0) = zsubst d0 a (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Bootstrapping.Arithmetic.numeral 0)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.red_zIneg {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (s p d0 : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              red (zIneg s p d0) = d0
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.red_zInd {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (s at' p d0 d1 : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              red (zInd s at' p d0 d1) = iRInd (zInd s at' p d0 d1)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.red_zAxAll {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (s p k : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              red (zAxAll s p k) = zAxAll s p k
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.red_zAxNeg {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (s p : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              red (zAxNeg s p) = zAxNeg s p
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.red_zAx1 {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (s C : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              red (zAx1 s C) = zAx1 s C
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.red_zAxBot {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (s : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              red (zAxBot s) = zAxBot s
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.red_zK {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (s r ds : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              red (zK s r ds) = iRK (zK s r ds) (redTable (zK s r ds - 1))

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              The K-rule recursion equation for the GENUINE reduct: red of a chain is the tag-4 DISPATCH iRK (Buchholz Def 3.2 case 5: 5.1 critical / 5.2.1 splice / 5.2.2 replace), reading per-premise reducts from the table-so-far redTable (zK s r ds - 1). The branch-specific recursion equations (red_zK_crit / the 5.2 forms) refine this with znth (redTable …) (znth ds k) = red (znth ds k).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.red_zK_crit {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {s r ds : V} (hcrit : ¬permIdx (zK s r ds) < LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              red (zK s r ds) = iRcritG (zK s r ds) fun (n : V) => zAxReduct (red (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds n))

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              5.1 critical recursion equation — when the chain is critical (permIdx (zK s r ds) = lh ds, i.e. no permissible premise), red takes the 5.1 branch iRKc, which is the genuine critical reduct iRcritG with the two auxiliaries' premise-reducts supplied RECURSIVELY (red (znth ds (redexI/redexJ ..))).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              noncomputable def GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.critReductCorr {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (d n : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              V

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              The genuine re-principalized critical reduct supplier — the concrete ρ that red's tag-4 critical branch MUST emit (the corrected version of the engine's fun n => zAxReduct (red (znth ds n))). At the two redexes it reads the cut data from d's own structure:

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • R-redex (n = redexI d, the I∀ premise): zsubst (zIallPrem dᵢ) (zIallEig dᵢ) (numeral k) — re-principalized at the L-instance k = π₁(π₂(tp dⱼ)) (instead of the engine's instance-0).
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • L-redex (n = redexJ d, the axAll premise): zAx1 (seqAddAnt (cutFormula d) (fstIdx dⱼ)) (cutFormula d) — the §5 logical axiom Ax^1, antecedent grown by the cut instance, succedent = cutFormula d.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • elsewhere: the engine reduct zAxReduct (red dₙ) (irrelevant: iRcritG only reads ρ at the redexes). This is a noncomputable function of d (engine-definable: every accessor is 𝚺₁), so the re-keying swaps iRKc to iRcritG d (critReductCorr d) and its iRKcDef arithmetization to match. Both halves of the genuine reduct's correctness are proven against it: SOUNDNESS (ZDerivation_iRcritG_critReductCorr, Crux2Blueprint) and DESCENT (iord_descent_iRcritG_critReductCorr, RedZKDescent).
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Equations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • One or more equations did not get rendered due to their size.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Instances For
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.critReductCorr_redexJ {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (d : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                critReductCorr d (redexJ d) = zAx1 (seqAddAnt (cutFormula d) (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth (zKseq d) (redexJ d)))) (cutFormula d)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                critReductCorr at the L-redex redexJ: the §5 axAll reduct Ax^1_{F(k),Γⱼ→F(k)} (antecedent grown).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.critReductCorr_redexI {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {d : V} (h : redexI d ≠ redexJ d) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                critReductCorr d (redexI d) = zsubst (zIallPrem (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth (zKseq d) (redexI d))) (zIallEig (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth (zKseq d) (redexI d))) (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Bootstrapping.Arithmetic.numeral (π₁ π₂ tp (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth (zKseq d) (redexJ d))))

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                critReductCorr at the R-redex redexI (when redexI ≠ redexJ): the re-principalized I∀ premise zsubst dᵢ aᵢ (numeral k), k = π₁(π₂(tp dⱼ)).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                noncomputable def GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.critReductNeg {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (d n : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                V

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                The genuine critical reduct supplier for the ¬-case (the critReductCorr twin for Aᵢ = ¬A). This is the concrete ρ the re-keyed tag-4 critical branch emits when the R-redex is an I¬ rule (zTag dᵢ = 2). Buchholz Def 3.2 case 5.1, ¬-subcase, plus §5 Lemma 5.1 case 2.2:

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                • L-redex (n = redexJ d, the axNeg axiom): zAx1 (seqSetSucc sⱼ A) A — the §5 logical axiom Ax^1_{Γⱼ→A} (succedent SET to the cut formula A = cutFormula d, antecedent Γⱼ kept; the §5 reduct dⱼ[0] of Ax^{¬A,0}). Note: seqSetSucc (REPLACE succedent), NOT seqAddAnt — the ¬-axiom reduct replaces the succedent, where the ∀-axiom reduct grows the antecedent.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                • R-redex (n = redexI d, the I¬ rule): zInegPrem dᵢ — the I¬ child dᵢ[0] = d₀ (deriving A,Γᵢ→⊥), read as the DIRECT 𝚺₁ accessor zInegPrem (zIneg sᵢ A d0) = d0 (zInegPrem_zIneg), which equals the recursive red (zIneg sᵢ A d0) = d0 (red_zIneg) but is red-free — so critReductNeg is fully arithmetizable (the engine iRKc graph cannot call red; the I¬ child is an accessor, not a reduct). No re-principalization (unlike the ∀ R-redex, which needs the numeral k instance).
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                • elsewhere: irrelevant (iRcritGNeg reads ρ only at the redexes); kept as zAxReduct (red dₙ) to mirror critReductCorr's dead else-branch. The two read-offs (critReductNeg d (redexI d)/(redexJ d)) feed hρI/hρJ of ZDerivation_iRcritGNeg_corrected_neg directly.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Equations

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.critReductNeg_redexJ {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (d : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  critReductNeg d (redexJ d) = zAx1 (seqSetSucc (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth (zKseq d) (redexJ d))) (cutFormula d)) (cutFormula d)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  critReductNeg at the L-redex redexJ: the §5 axNeg reduct Ax^1_{Γⱼ→A}.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.critReductNeg_redexI {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {d : V} (h : redexI d ≠ redexJ d) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  critReductNeg d (redexI d) = zInegPrem (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth (zKseq d) (redexI d))

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  critReductNeg at the R-redex redexI (when redexI ≠ redexJ): the I¬ child zInegPrem dᵢ = d₀.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  noncomputable def GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iRKcCrit {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (d : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  V

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  The re-keyed tag-4 critical reduct — fully explicit, dispatched on R-redex polarity. This is the object the engine iRKc MUST become: a polarity dispatch (zTag dᵢ = 1 ⟺ I∀ R-redex) emitting the soundness-certified corrected reduct, in fully-explicit iCritReductG … seqUpdate … form (red-free, table-free, no nested if — directly arithmetizable). The two branches are exactly iRcritG d (critReductCorr d) (∀, iRKcCrit_eq_corr) and iRcritGNeg d (critReductNeg d) (¬, iRKcCrit_eq_neg), whose SOUNDNESS is ZDerivation_iRcritG_critReductCorr/ZDerivation_iRcritGNeg_critReductNeg and whose DESCENT is iord_iRcritG_eq_iRcrit/iord_iRcritGNeg_eq_iRcrit. Defined standalone (depends only on d, NOT the engine table) so its 𝚺₁ arithmetization lands additively, before the engine swap.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Equations
