                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.fstIdx_iRKcCrit {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (d : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx (iRKcCrit d) = LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx d
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.zTag_iRKcCrit {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (d : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    zTag (iRKcCrit d) = 4
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iRKcCrit_eq_corr {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {d : V} (h1 : zTag (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth (zKseq d) (redexI d)) = 1) (h : redexI d ≠ redexJ d) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    iRKcCrit d = iRcritG d (critReductCorr d)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    iRKcCrit = the ∀-case soundness-certified reduct iRcritG d (critReductCorr d) (I∀ R-redex).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iRKcCrit_eq_neg {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {d : V} (h1 : zTag (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth (zKseq d) (redexI d)) ≠ 1) (h : redexI d ≠ redexJ d) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    iRKcCrit d = iRcritGNeg d (critReductNeg d)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    iRKcCrit = the ¬-case soundness-certified reduct iRcritGNeg d (critReductNeg d) (I¬ R-redex).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    noncomputable def LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.iRKcCritDef :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    𝚺₁.Semisentence 2

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    𝚺₁ graph of the re-keyed critical reduct iRKcCrit. Dispatches on the R-redex tag ti = zTag dᵢ: ti = 1 (I∀) builds iRcritG's iCritReductG with the re-principalized zsubst at slot i and the §5 Ax^1 (antecedent-grown) at slot j; otherwise (I¬) builds iRcritGNeg's SWAPPED-slot iCritReductG with the §5 Ax^1 (succedent-set) at slot j and the zInegPrem child at slot i. Reuses the cutFormulaDef instance-k = π₁(π₂(tp dⱼ)) threading + numeralGraph.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Equations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    • One or more equations did not get rendered due to their size.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Instances For
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      instance GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iRKcCrit_defined {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      𝚺₁-Function₁ iRKcCrit via LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.iRKcCritDef
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      instance GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iRKcCrit_definable {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      𝚺₁-Function₁ iRKcCrit

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      The critical-only reduct is NON-critical (lap 86) — the 5.2 dispatch is mandatory #

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      Gating finding (Buchholz Def 3.2 case 5, validated in-kernel). Buchholz's reduction of a chain d = K^r_Π d₀…dₗ splits into critical (5.1) / sub-critical-splice (5.2.1) / non-critical (5.2.2). The repo's red/iR2 implement only 5.1 (always iRcritG/iCritReduct). But the 5.1 reduct K^{r-1}_Π⟨d{0}, d{1}⟩ is itself a chain whose distinguished ⊥-half d{1} = K_{A(d),Θ→D} ds1 is a K-rule (tp = isymRep), permissible for the conclusion (iperm_isymRep). So the reduct is non-critical — zKCritical (fstIdx (red d)) (zKseq (red d)) FAILS. Consequently the iterate-descent iord_iR2_iterate_descends's criticality hypothesis hcrit is unsatisfiable after one reduction step: the critical-only reduct cannot drive the infinite descent on its own. The genuine red MUST dispatch the Buchholz 5.2 cases (splice / replace-premise) on non-critical chains; their ordinal descent is already banked (iord_descent_iCritAux / iord_descent_iSpliceEnd, lap 82).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.not_zKCritical_iCritReductG {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (s C rOut rIn0 rIn1 ds0 ds1 : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      ¬zKCritical (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx (iCritReductG s C rOut rIn0 rIn1 ds0 ds1)) (zKseq (iCritReductG s C rOut rIn0 rIn1 ds0 ds1))

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      The genuine critical reduct iCritReductG produces a NON-critical chain: its distinguished premise (index 1, the A(d),Θ→D half, succedent D) is itself a K-chain, so tp = isymRep, permissible for ANY conclusion (iperm_isymRep). Hence zKCritical FAILS at index 1. (The in-kernel witness that the critical-only reduct is incomplete — the lap-86 analog of not_zKValid_iCritReduct.)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.not_zKCritical_iRcritG {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (d : V) (ρ : V → V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      ¬zKCritical (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx (iRcritG d ρ)) (zKseq (iRcritG d ρ))

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      The reduct iRcritG d ρ is a non-critical chain (corollary of not_zKCritical_iCritReductG).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.not_zKCritical_red_zK {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {s r ds : V} (hcrit : ¬permIdx (zK s r ds) < LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      ¬zKCritical (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx (red (zK s r ds))) (zKseq (red (zK s r ds)))

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      red of a CRITICAL K-chain is itself a non-critical K-chain. The 5.1 reduct produces a chain whose ⊥-premise is a Rep, so zKCritical fails — the iterate-descent's criticality hypothesis is UNSATISFIABLE after one step (lap-86 finding). This is exactly why the genuine red MUST dispatch the Buchholz 5.2 cases (iRK now does) on the non-critical reducts. (Now hypothesised on the chain being critical — the case where red = iRKc = iRcritG.)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.tp_isymRep_of_emptyAnt_botSucc {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {s d : V} (hZ : ZDerivation d) (hant : seqAnt s = ∅) (hsucc : seqSucc s = LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Bootstrapping.qqFalsum) (hperm : iperm (tp d) s) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      tp d = isymRep

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      Corollary 2.1 (Buchholz): a permissible premise of a ∅→⊥ chain is Rep. An I-rule premise (isymR) would need succedent ⊥ (impossible — I-rules introduce ∀/¬); an axiom premise (isymLk) would need a formula in the empty antecedent (impossible). So on the ⊥-orbit the selected premise is always Rep — the fact that makes the conclusion-reducing red (route B, lap 96) keep Π there.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.tp_selected_isymRep_of_emptyAnt_botSucc {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {s r ds : V} (hZ : ZDerivation (zK s r ds)) (hant : seqAnt s = ∅) (hsucc : seqSucc s = LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Bootstrapping.qqFalsum) (hlt : permIdx (zK s r ds) < LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      tp (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds (permIdx (zK s r ds))) = isymRep

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      The selected premise of a ∅→⊥ chain is Rep. For a chain zK s r ds deriving ∅→⊥ whose least-permissible premise index is in range (permIdx < lh ds), that premise has tp = Rep (Cor 2.1 applied to the permissible selected premise). This discharges the route-B iRKr conclusion-reduction on the ⊥-orbit (tpReduce isymRep = id), so red keeps the ∅→⊥ conclusion.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.fstIdx_red_of_tag_Ind_or_K {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {d : V} (hZ : ZDerivation d) (htag : zTag d = 3 ∨ zTag d = 4) (hsel : zTag d = 4 → permIdx d < LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh (zKseq d) → tp (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth (zKseq d) (permIdx d)) = isymRep) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx (red d) = LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx d

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      red preserves the end-sequent on the chain-reduct rules (Ind, K), given a Rep selected premise for the chain case (route B, lap 96: the 5.2.2 reduct reduces the conclusion to tpReduce (tp dᵢ) Π 0, which is Π iff tp dᵢ = Rep). The Ind reduct (iRInd) and the 5.1/5.2.1 chain branches keep Π unconditionally; the chain replace branch keeps Π exactly under hsel. On the ⊥-orbit hsel holds by Cor 2.1 (tp_selected_isymRep_of_emptyAnt_botSucc).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.fstIdx_red_of_emptyAnt_botSucc {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {d : V} (hZ : ZDerivation d) (hant : seqAnt (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx d) = ∅) (hsucc : seqSucc (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx d) = LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Bootstrapping.qqFalsum) (htag : zTag d = 3 ∨ zTag d = 4) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx (red d) = LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx d

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      red keeps the ∅→⊥ conclusion on the ⊥-orbit. Discharges fstIdx_red_of_tag_Ind_or_K's hsel via Cor 2.1: the selected premise of a ∅→⊥ chain is Rep. This is the headline-relevant conclusion invariant — red of a contradiction derivation again concludes ∅→⊥. (Stated on the raw ∅→⊥ data since ZDerivesEmpty is defined later in the file; the packaged form is fstIdx_red_of_ZDerivesEmpty.)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.fstIdx_red_zK_of_selected_Rep {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {s r ds : V} (hsel : permIdx (zK s r ds) < LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh ds → ¬(zTag (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds (permIdx (zK s r ds))) = 4 ∧ ¬permIdx (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds (permIdx (zK s r ds))) < LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh (zKseq (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds (permIdx (zK s r ds))))) → tp (LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth ds (permIdx (zK s r ds))) = isymRep) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx (red (zK s r ds)) = LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.fstIdx (zK s r ds)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      red keeps the chain conclusion when the selected premise is Rep (the GENERAL Rep-reduction, lap 100). Generalizes fstIdx_red_of_emptyAnt_botSucc's K-case OFF the ∅→⊥ hypothesis: fstIdx (red (zK s r ds)) = fstIdx (zK s r ds) holds whenever the chain's selected premise is Rep-or-a-critical-chain (the exact fstIdx_iRK_of_Rep precondition). This is the precise content of redZKReady's chain-Rep residual fstIdx (red dᵢ) = fstIdx dᵢ: it is NOT ∅→⊥ that matters but the (hereditary) Rep-ness of the selected premise. On the ⊥-orbit tp_selected_isymRep_of_emptyAnt_botSucc discharges hsel at the top; the motive must propagate it down selected-premise chains (the core hereditary obligation).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      The ordinal of red's K-case = the ordinal of iR2's K-case (the descent bridge) #

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      iRcritG (genuine, correct endsequents) and iRcrit (ordinal-shadow) differ ONLY in the auxiliaries' conclusion sequents (seqSetSucc/seqAddAnt vs the reused fstIdx d). Since iotil/idg of a chain zK s r ds are independent of s (iotil_zK = iseqNaddIdg ds, idg_zK = max r (iseqMaxIdg ds - 1)), the two reducts carry the SAME iord. So the (banked) ordinal descent on iRcrit transfers verbatim to red's K-case — red's validity-faithfulness costs nothing on the ordinal side.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iotil_iRcritG_eq_iRcrit {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (d : V) (ρ : V → V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      iotil (iRcritG d ρ) = iotil (iRcrit d ρ)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.idg_iRcritG_eq_iRcrit {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (d : V) (ρ : V → V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      idg (iRcritG d ρ) = idg (iRcrit d ρ)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iord_iRcritG_eq_iRcrit {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (d : V) (ρ : V → V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      iord (iRcritG d ρ) = iord (iRcrit d ρ)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      The genuine reduct's K-case has the same ordinal as the ordinal-shadow iRcrit.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      The ¬-case constructor iRcritGNeg shares iord with iRcrit too (the swap is #/max-commutative) #

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      iRcritGNeg is iRcritG with the two seqUpdate halves at redexI/redexJ SWAPPED (Buchholz's polarity swap for Aᵢ=¬A). Since iotil(iCritReductG …) = ω^{õ ds0} # ω^{õ ds1} (inadd, commutative on NF args) and idg(…) = max(idg ds0)(idg ds1) (commutative unconditionally), the swap leaves iord INVARIANT. So the descent twin for the engine re-key's ¬-branch reuses the banked iord descent on iRcrit verbatim — the ordinal side is polarity-blind (the #/max are symmetric), exactly as the lap-117 handoff predicted. The iotil half needs the two folds NF (the hNF/hρNF data already threaded at the descent call site iord_descent_iRcrit_of_chain); the idg half is unconditional.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.idg_iRcritGNeg_eq_iRcrit {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (d : V) (ρ : V → V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      idg (iRcritGNeg d ρ) = idg (iRcrit d ρ)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iotil_iRcritGNeg_eq_iRcrit {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (d : V) (ρ : V → V) (hNFI : InternalONote.isNF (iseqNaddIdg (seqUpdate (zKseq d) (redexI d) (ρ (redexI d))))) (hNFJ : InternalONote.isNF (iseqNaddIdg (seqUpdate (zKseq d) (redexJ d) (ρ (redexJ d))))) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      iotil (iRcritGNeg d ρ) = iotil (iRcrit d ρ)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iord_iRcritGNeg_eq_iRcrit {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (d : V) (ρ : V → V) (hNFI : InternalONote.isNF (iseqNaddIdg (seqUpdate (zKseq d) (redexI d) (ρ (redexI d))))) (hNFJ : InternalONote.isNF (iseqNaddIdg (seqUpdate (zKseq d) (redexJ d) (ρ (redexJ d))))) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      iord (iRcritGNeg d ρ) = iord (iRcrit d ρ)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      The ¬-case reduct's K-case has the same ordinal as the ordinal-shadow iRcrit (the iRcritGNeg twin of iord_iRcritG_eq_iRcrit; the engine re-key's ¬-branch descent re-point).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      Structural correctness of the iR2 table (mirror idg) #

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iRTable_seq {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (n : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.Seq (iRTable n)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iRTable_lh {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (n : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.lh (iRTable n) = n + 1
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.znth_iRTable_succ {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {n k : V} (hk : k < n + 1) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth (iRTable (n + 1)) k = LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth (iRTable n) k
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.znth_iRTable_eq_iR2 {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (N k : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      k ≤ N → LO.FirstOrder.Arithmetic.znth (iRTable N) k = iR2 k
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iR2_eq_iRNext {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] {c : V} (hpos : 0 < c) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      iR2 c = iRNext c (iRTable (c - 1))

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      iR2 c = iRNext c (iRTable (c-1)) for positive codes (the table-reduction unfolding).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      iR2 recursion equations (Buchholz Def 3.2, per rule) #

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iR2_zAtom {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (s : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      iR2 (zAtom s) = zAtom s
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iR2_zIall {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (s a p d0 : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      iR2 (zIall s a p d0) = d0
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iR2_zIneg {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (s p d0 : V) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      iR2 (zIneg s p d0) = d0
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      theorem GoodsteinPA.InternalZ.iR2_zInd {V : Type u_1} [LO.ORingStructure V] [V ⊧ₘ* 𝗜𝚺₁] (s at' p d0 d1 : V) :
